programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Luxury property developer Guy Phoenix embarks on a rollercoaster journey of buying and renovating a £16million Monaco apartment: the biggest investment and financial risk he has ever taken. As Guy makes the first steps towards finding the perfect Monaco apartment to renovate, things go wrong from day one, he quickly discovers that building in one of the most expensive places to live on the planet is anything but easy, as local planning restrictions and impossibly high building costs threaten to turn his lifelong dream of owning a luxury apartment in Monaco into a nightmare. To make matters worse, his £16million apartment doesn't even include a parking space

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill investigate the disappearance of Georgina Gharsallah who left her mum's house in March 2018 and was never seen again. The case is now being treated as a murder investigation and an examination of the circumstances of Georgina's disappearance leads the team to a shocking conclusion

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Paul and Glenda kick off the competition in their static caravan, but eyebrows are raised at his unromantic approach to his relationship. On day two self-confessed gadget geek David and his partner Jane show their competitive side with a confidently presented, well-received meal. Finally outdoorsy twentysomethings Matt and Polly show off their 'good life' approach to cooking with a home-grown feast

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple planning to transform a 1960s ambulance into a campervan, and an artist who has commissioned a giant wooden floating egg to use as a work and living space. He also discovers a novel way of turning a suburban basement in Nottingham into an aquarium, and begins his own project to create a fantasy tree house in the grounds of the Kielder National Park in Northumberland

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family goes on a holiday down the Kennet and Avon Canal onboard on a 65-foot barge, something that Sarah has always dreamt of doing. Braving the typically changeable English weather, they take on some tricky locks, fish for their dinner, explore the hills of Avoncliff on bike, venture out on the river to meet some beavers and swim with an urban mermaid

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca rashly accuses Sam's friend of stealing a pair of earrings and is forced to go to extreme lengths to get them back. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam tries to get a date with a psychiatrist who is a colleague of Frasier and Lilith, but she will not give him the time of day, so he makes an appointment to see her in her office

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody's well-meant but modest birthday present fails to impress his wealthy girlfriend, while Rebecca decides a new look will improve her career prospects. Woody Harrelson stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An offhand comment to the twins' new friend has dire consequences for Ray, who cannot understand why everyone is so upset - but he compounds his error by accidentally repeating the remark to the boy's father. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Marie's home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The station shock-jocks decide to play practical jokes - and Frasier's pompous manner makes him the ideal target for their dubious humour. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes a new position as a magazine art critic, prompting a jealous Frasier to respond by launching his own arts show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Dog That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: Martin returns from a friend's funeral upset by how it was conducted, and begins to plan his own memorial. Meanwhile, sacked DJ Bulldog takes the opportunity to embark on an entirely new career - in pizza delivery. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier fall out, each convinced the other is secretly coveting his date. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The team uncover a former firefighter's stockpile, which includes an ultra-rare piece of space age history. Frank Fritz's plan goes up in smoke

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore a Fiat X1/9 for 53-year-old owner Steve, who has terminal cancer and is desperate to see his son drive the car

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Burglars target a historical settlement in Puglia and a pair of village saviours in France prepare to welcome their first guest. Work begins on an abandoned village in Portugal

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson jets off to the eastern Costa del Sol in southern Spain to help Joanne and Darren from south Wales find the perfect holiday home for them and their family. Darren, a former Mr Wales bodybuilding champion, is especially looking forward to more outdoor exercise in the warm weather. They have a budget of £180,000 for their dream property, so hope Jean can find one appealing enough for them to make an offer

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Peter and Noni swap their beloved narrowboat Barbarella for a hire boat, as they set course for the epic Falkirk Wheel, the world's only rotating boat lift. Josh, Hayley and their family celebrate a special birthday afloat, while Tom embarks on his maiden voyage from Nantwich on the Shropshire Union Canal, venturing beyond the marina and into new waters. And a canal infrastructure emergency needs the Canal & River Trust team's urgent attention

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: At Château de la Fare, Janet and Philip reach dizzying heights in their stairwell renovation. In Nouvelle-Aquitaine Denise and Brett tackle an en-suite and near Périgueux, Lia and Richard attempt to get their kitchen party-ready.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: The Rodriguez sisters help fitness-mad couple Kris and Ali relocate to Spain full-time and Darren and Natalie Brown help married couple Terry and Maria find a new home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with a couple in Edinburgh, and one in Derbyshire, almost 20 years after their search with the dream duo, which means they've had plenty of time for life to move on in wonderful ways. Kirstie and Phil first searched with Steph and Tana in Edinburgh in 2020, and although one house really stood out for them, its proximity to Edinburgh Airport's flightpath put them off. After the search they took Kirstie and Phil's advice on board and broadened their search, and four years on the pair find them in a house where they weren't afraid to get stuck in themselves. Wendy and Simon asked for Kirstie and Phil's help in Derbyshire way back in 2007, when they needed a house that could also accommodate their businesses - Wendy's as a fashion designer and Simon's as a photographer. They had an offer accepted, which ultimately fell through, but five years later they were in a three-bed cottage in Darley Abbey. They decided to keep work and home separate, so were renting a business unit nearby and work was flourishing. Fast forward another 12 years and it's all change again - a new house, two children and three photographic studios!

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a couple who face a race against time to realise their dream. Two years ago, corporate accountant Pep was diagnosed with terminal cancer. But rather than rest and avoid stress, Pep and partner Malene focused their attention on a long-held ambition to build a new house on their land in the Surrey Hills. The plan is to construct a modern take on a Viking hall, inspired by their love of all things Scandinavian and Malene's Danish heritage. But they must build quickly so Pep can enjoy what time she has left in the finished home

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: On north London's prestigious Billionaires' Row, Jeremy Fine is selling Fair Hill, a £20 million mansion steeped in royal history. Spanning 13,900 square feet, it boasts six reception rooms, eight bedrooms and a nightclub-style party room. He enlists international buying agent Nick Dawson to gauge interest from his billionaire clients. In Hertfordshire, Margaret Towney helps serial property flippers Mark and Linda turn a profit on Asterley House - previously lived in by Vinnie Jones - while simultaneously hunting for their next dream home. Could Cheryl Cole's former residence be the ideal solution?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Property developer Guy Phoenix buys and renovates a £16million apartment in Monaco, the biggest investment and financial risk he has ever taken. In this second of two programmes, as he navigates the intricacies of building in one of the most expensive places to live on the planet, Guy comes under pressure to complete his luxury apartment in time for the upcoming Monaco Grand Prix. As the finish line gets closer, the pressure and stress on both him and his crack team of builders becomes almost unbearable

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett is joined by Alan Davies to sample an action-packed weekend in Trieste, northern Italy. Trieste is famous for the Bora, the north-easterly wind said to shape the city and its inhabitants. Joe and Alan discover this at the Wind Museum, where curator Rino presides over a collection of wind samples donated from all over the world. A few miles north the pair enjoy a food and fizz pairing in the village of Prosecco. Fortunately, they're in the right place for hangovers as Trieste is Italy's caffeine capital. No mini break is complete without learning a new skill to brag about when you get home, so Joe and Alan attend a painting class

programme.title: Rosaline (2022)
programme.desc: A member of an aristocratic family is dumped by her suitor Romeo in favour of her own cousin Juliet. Outraged at the betrayal, she sets out to sabotage the most famous love story in history. Romantic comedy, starring Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples' dinner parties

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family enhance their new greenhouse to make it well and truly part of their home, as it turned into a sanctuary for Sarah to escape to during her chemotherapy treatment. Sarah and Graham want to create warmth for people as well as plants, so they transform the greenhouse into a welcoming outdoor room complete with an antique wood burner. Alongside the greenhouse transformation, the family also put on a chicken rehoming event

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's second wedding anniversary arrives and she's convinced that Eddie will remember to send her a gift, even though he's travelling with the ice show. Meanwhile, Woody is gripped by gambling fever

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam grows tired of wooing Rebecca and decides to switch his amorous attentions to her sister instead - but ends up with a dead body on his hands. Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Celebrated marriage guidance expert Dr Lawrence Crandell, an old friend of Frasier's, visits town on a book tour, but in between preaching marital fidelity he makes a pass at Rebecca. Kirstie Alley and Ted Danson star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier are excited to learn they may be descended from Russian royalty, and Martin appears on the Antiques Roadshow. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to settle a score with a plastic surgeon, only to find himself attracted to her, while Frasier is disappointed by the lack of achievements listed in his obituary when it is published prematurely

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick does his best to get Frasier and Lilith back together during a Thanksgiving visit. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and Trevor Einhorn

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. A bout of crippling back pain prompts Frasier to begin taking strong medication - which dulls his senses and causes him to accidentally blurt out a long-held secret to Daphne. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Expert buyers Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz hunt down hidden treasures and valuable relics across the USA, uncovering incredible artefacts and captivating stories of American life and history. The guys go big in Texas with a mega-pick at the first Dr Pepper bottling plant and tough negotiations in a 50,000 square-foot warehouse

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend come to the rescue of their first-ever custom car - a radically modified VW Beetle called a VW Wizard

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A family feel the financial strain of trying to resurrect an Italian ghost village. The owners of a crumbling French hamlet attempt to save the decaying village bakery and its roof, while those in charge of a restored village in the Italian hills prepare to hold their biggest event yet

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Michael and his sister Catherine live many miles apart but they're planning on seeing a lot more of each other as they pool their resources to buy a holiday home together. They've chosen Manilva on the Costa del Sol and need somewhere with enough space to share with their immediate families and wider family circle. For their budget of £175,000, Jean Johansson lines up five exciting options. Can she find their perfect holiday home in the sun?

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: On the Ashby Canal, floating candlemaker Connor gears up for the first day of the trading season as he heads to Whitchurch, and crosses paths with floating favourite The Curry Cruiser. Peter and Noni continue their breathtaking Scottish escapade, while Tom discovers that mooring a narrowboat can be anything but straightforward. And the Canal River Trust team tackle a stubborn stretch of weeds threatening to clog up the cut near Wolverhampton

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: At Château Destinée, the pressure's on for Linda and Peter to restore riverside steps for a wedding. Matt and Amelia search for their forever family chateau. And in Normandy, Steve and Tim transform a tatty bathroom into an Italian-inspired breakfast room

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, mother and son Sharon and Shaun Garner help restaurateurs Alison and Steve relocate from the Costa del Sol. With a maximum budget of 130,000 euros the heat is on to find the perfect place for the couple and their precious pooches. Meanwhile, Shaun asks husband Salva and niece and nephew Luca and Alicia to help surprise Steve and Sharon on their ruby wedding anniversary. In Alicante, sisters Sophie and Charlotte are with Ken and Christine from Newcastle-upon-Tyne, who want a holiday home to enjoy in their imminent retirement. With a budget of 100,000 euros, outdoor space for their grandkids is their top priority

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds
programme.desc: In Worsley in Greater Manchester, George helps Katherine and Andrew to renovate their new home's awkward extension and split-level living space, and reveal the home's stunning view, while landscaper Luke tackles the steeply sloped, hazardous rear garden

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final, and at the end of this episode, one of the five competitors will walk away with a trophy that looks very little like Greg Davies tucked under their arm. But before that, Amy Gledhill literally tears her hair out, Armando Iannucci plays the recorder while riding a trike with a plunger on his head, Joel Dommett sniffs the contents of a vacuum, Kumail Nanjiani mistreats a beloved resident of the Taskmaster house and Joanna Page lays waste to Little Alex Horne. Plus, the greatest pillow fights of all time

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Loyal chauffeur Kabir wants the team to tell the life story of his boss, hard-working financier Mr Eblen Archer. Sam thinks it seems like such a heart-warming idea, until he realises there isn't much of a story to tell. However, Pat knows the rich and famous always have sordid secrets, so the team go in search of scandals their subject is involved in

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A couple become trapped in an underground cave, so Sam and his crew respond immediately to the national emergency by planning a movie that they can send down to lift their spirits. However, to complicate matters, an actual rescue team are also on site, who keep getting in the movie-makers' way - and who might just save the couple before the movie is finished. Offbeat comedy, written by and starring Sam Campbell

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Outsider
programme.desc: Footage from the comedian's 2016 stage show, recorded at the Brighton Dome. The plain-speaking Geordie stand-up shares her thoughts on moving to the countryside, getting a rescue dog and her struggles with irritable bowel syndrome

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare. Marie, Saul and George have no choice but to join the battle, as the two households conspire against each other. But Clive's fury won't be stopped, and the danger to Leo gets closer

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Leo and Clive stand alone, face-to-face, in the ultimate confrontation on a night of terror. Meanwhile, Zee reaches out to help George, and they embark on a joyous voyage of discovery. It's a wild night on the streets of Manchester, as violence explodes, souls are laid bare, dangerous games are played and decisions are made that will have terrible consequences for everyone

programme.title: Little Richard: I Am Everything (2023)
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life of the one-of-a-kind rock 'n' roll icon who shaped the world of music. Contributors include John Waters, Mick Jagger and Tom Jones

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, civil partners Andrew and David serve up a 'ritzy' affair for their guests, but their food gets a mixed reaction. On the second night, hosts Emma and Richard face a grilling over their use of shop-bought ingredients. Meanwhile, Richard and Joey's 'bromance' develops when they feed each other heart-shaped strawberries. Last to host are newlyweds Joey and Hannah, who serve basic wholesome food, but argue over the size of their fishcakes

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family prepare the farm for the arrival of two piglets. After building an enclosure, the piglets arrive and get settled into their new home - but it isn't long before they've escaped, leaving Graham the task of locating the playful porkers. Keen to immerse themselves in all the West Country has to offer, the family also head to Stonehenge for the autumn equinox sunrise

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rebecca fears for her sanity after having erotic dreams about Sam just after an old flame has walked back into her life. Kirstie Alley and Ted Danson star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. When multi-millionaire Robin Colcord tells Rebecca she is the sole reason he visits Cheers, she forgets her intention to give Sam a chance and takes off for a weekend with him instead

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam seeks a new challenge and decides to run a bar on his own to take his mind off Rebecca's relationship with millionaire Robin Colcord. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Ray's interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles clashes with girlfriend Mel over a misunderstanding, Daphne picks up the wrong signals, and friends are thin on the ground at Frasier's Christmas party. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes take a trip in the Winnebago on New Year's Eve to celebrate the turn of the new millennium, but a case of mistaken identity leaves Frasier and Martin trying to rescue Niles from another family's van

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Property developer Guy Phoenix buys and renovates a £16million apartment in Monaco, the biggest investment and financial risk he has ever taken. In this second of two programmes, as he navigates the intricacies of building in one of the most expensive places to live on the planet, Guy comes under pressure to complete his luxury apartment in time for the upcoming Monaco Grand Prix. As the finish line gets closer, the pressure and stress on both him and his crack team of builders becomes almost unbearable

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Paul and Glenda kick off the competition in their static caravan, but eyebrows are raised at his unromantic approach to his relationship. On day two self-confessed gadget geek David and his partner Jane show their competitive side with a confidently presented, well-received meal. Finally outdoorsy twentysomethings Matt and Polly show off their 'good life' approach to cooking with a home-grown feast

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the uncertainty over summer holidays, ever since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled. She finds out whether foreign holidays are now out of the question or if the opposite is true, with bargains to be had. She also explores whether holidaying in the UK could be a smarter alternative.

The plan is to construct a modern take on a Viking hall, inspired by their love of all things Scandinavian and Malene's Danish heritage. But they must build quickly so Pep can enjoy what time she has left in the finished home

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: On north London's prestigious Billionaires' Row, Jeremy Fine is selling Fair Hill, a £20 million mansion steeped in royal history. Spanning 13,900 square feet, it boasts six reception rooms, eight bedrooms and a nightclub-style party room. He enlists international buying agent Nick Dawson to gauge interest from his billionaire clients. In Hertfordshire, Margaret Towney helps serial property flippers Mark and Linda turn a profit on Asterley House - previously lived in by Vinnie Jones - while simultaneously hunting for their next dream home. Could Cheryl Cole's former residence be the ideal solution?

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Luxury property developer Guy Phoenix embarks on a rollercoaster journey of buying and renovating a £16million Monaco apartment: the biggest investment and financial risk he has ever taken. As Guy makes the first steps towards finding the perfect Monaco apartment to renovate, things go wrong from day one, he quickly discovers that building in one of the most expensive places to live on the planet is anything but easy, as local planning restrictions and impossibly high building costs threaten to turn his lifelong dream of owning a luxury apartment in Monaco into a nightmare. To make matters worse, his £16million apartment doesn't even include a parking space

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare. Marie, Saul and George have no choice but to join the battle, as the two households conspire against each other. But Clive's fury won't be stopped, and the danger to Leo gets closer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett is joined by Alan Davies to sample an action-packed weekend in Trieste, northern Italy. Trieste is famous for the Bora, the north-easterly wind said to shape the city and its inhabitants. Joe and Alan discover this at the Wind Museum, where curator Rino presides over a collection of wind samples donated from all over the world. A few miles north the pair enjoy a food and fizz pairing in the village of Prosecco. Fortunately, they're in the right place for hangovers as Trieste is Italy's caffeine capital. No mini break is complete without learning a new skill to brag about when you get home, so Joe and Alan attend a painting class

programme.title: Rosaline (2022)
programme.desc: A member of an aristocratic family is dumped by her suitor Romeo in favour of her own cousin Juliet. Outraged at the betrayal, she sets out to sabotage the most famous love story in history. Romantic comedy, starring Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples' dinner parties

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family enhance their new greenhouse to make it well and truly part of their home, as it turned into a sanctuary for Sarah to escape to during her chemotherapy treatment. Sarah and Graham want to create warmth for people as well as plants, so they transform the greenhouse into a welcoming outdoor room complete with an antique wood burner. Alongside the greenhouse transformation, the family also put on a chicken rehoming event

programme.desc: Celebrated marriage guidance expert Dr Lawrence Crandell, an old friend of Frasier's, visits town on a book tour, but in between preaching marital fidelity he makes a pass at Rebecca. Kirstie Alley and Ted Danson star

programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.desc: Niles and Frasier are excited to learn they may be descended from Russian royalty, and Martin appears on the Antiques Roadshow. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.desc: A family feel the financial strain of trying to resurrect an Italian ghost village. The owners of a crumbling French hamlet attempt to save the decaying village bakery and its roof, while those in charge of a restored village in the Italian hills prepare to hold their biggest event yet

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Michael and his sister Catherine live many miles apart but they're planning on seeing a lot more of each other as they pool their resources to buy a holiday home together. They've chosen Manilva on the Costa del Sol and need somewhere with enough space to share with their immediate families and wider family circle. For their budget of £175,000, Jean Johansson lines up five exciting options. Can she find their perfect holiday home in the sun?

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: On the Ashby Canal, floating candlemaker Connor gears up for the first day of the trading season as he heads to Whitchurch, and crosses paths with floating favourite The Curry Cruiser. Peter and Noni continue their breathtaking Scottish escapade, while Tom discovers that mooring a narrowboat can be anything but straightforward. And the Canal River Trust team tackle a stubborn stretch of weeds threatening to clog up the cut near Wolverhampton

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: At Château Destinée, the pressure's on for Linda and Peter to restore riverside steps for a wedding. Matt and Amelia search for their forever family chateau. And in Normandy, Steve and Tim transform a tatty bathroom into an Italian-inspired breakfast room

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, mother and son Sharon and Shaun Garner help restaurateurs Alison and Steve relocate from the Costa del Sol. With a maximum budget of 130,000 euros the heat is on to find the perfect place for the couple and their precious pooches. Meanwhile, Shaun asks husband Salva and niece and nephew Luca and Alicia to help surprise Steve and Sharon on their ruby wedding anniversary. In Alicante, sisters Sophie and Charlotte are with Ken and Christine from Newcastle-upon-Tyne, who want a holiday home to enjoy in their imminent retirement. With a budget of 100,000 euros, outdoor space for their grandkids is their top priority

programme.title: Make That Movie

programme.desc: Monica excitedly starts making preparations for her big day, only to discover her parents have spent all the wedding money on a beach house. Phoebe moves her massage parlour into Ross's apartment and Rachel's choice of reading matter raises eyebrows

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: The Pritchett-Tuckers throw a huge Thanksgiving party and Cameron spares no expense, while Jay has to figure out a way to keep his blood pressure down on one of the most stressful days of the year. While Phil tries to get used to Rainer Shine dating his daughter, Hayley has to break it to her dad that she would rather spend the rest of her holiday with her new boyfriend than stay for the traditional family football game

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teenage daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected, while Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club, and unwittingly helps Jay with his petition. programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing they'd never let her go

programme.title: The Simpsons

Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Dating Naked UK

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: This episode, the pop-up parlour in the sun gets a visit from Peter, who needs assistance to fix his shocking cock-up. Glen is helping family man Kieren clean away a reminder of a holiday conquest, while Alice meets Jenny, who aims to get a very special tribute to her organ donor. Also popping into the studio are Lise, who wants rid of a tattoo in honour of her snakey ex, gold-medal-winning Simon, whose power-lifting image needs a reboot, and Olivia, who is keen to get her rubbish writing erased.Series Prod: Lucie Rake; Exec Prods: Tim Harcourt, Matt J Smith; Prod Co: Studio Lambert

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Renee Maloney, the co-founder of art class studios Painting with a Twist, goes undercover in her own organisation to make sure that her growth projections for the company are possible. programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landoll's Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. programme.desc: Sports-loving Brazilian Eduardo takes sole charge of organising his wedding to Polish fiance Paulina, knowing full well that if he gets any small detail wrong, she will not hold back and 'smash everything in her way'. programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is scepticism, competition and high emotions when Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famous doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book, Clean Out Your Junk Drawer, encourages people to get out all their emotional junk to become healthier people and better partners and spouses

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains in which she hopes she and her family will be able to enjoy a picture-perfect white Christmas. However, when the clan arrives, unhelpful weather and a random eccentric guest conspire to ruin the festive cheer. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam resolve to make up for their bad carolling experience last year, and Jay has a huge announcement that catches Claire off-guard. Comedy, starring Sofia Vergara

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts her own sandwich shop after her snacks become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. However, running a business proves challenging - especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a crossover episode with Futurama, the Planet Express crew members travel back in time and turn up in Springfield on a mission to prevent the troublesome family from destroying the future. It's not just a question of asking nicely however - Bender has been programmed to kill Bart, Terminator-style. Can the clan foil the murderous bot?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Tuckers throw a huge Thanksgiving party and Cameron spares no expense, while Jay has to figure out a way to keep his blood pressure down on one of the most stressful days of the year. While Phil tries to get used to Rainer Shine dating his daughter, Hayley has to break it to her dad that she would rather spend the rest of her holiday with her new boyfriend than stay for the traditional family football game

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Hayley's plan for a fun-filled girl's day with Rainer Shine's teenage daughter may be a little more angst-filled than expected, while Luke finds himself in a compromising position with a widow at the club, and unwittingly helps Jay with his petition. At the Pritchett-Tucker home, Gloria, Phil and Cam have formed a secret alliance to ensure their respective mistakes are concealed from their spouses, but Mitchell starts suspecting something just isn't right

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A simple texting error threatens everything when Manny and Luke put on a fancy winter ball at the school, Mitchell gets a wake-up call when he offers to help, while Jay's thinly veiled attempt to get out of it by pretending to want to spend time with Phil backfires. Vanessa Bayer guests stars as an overbearing mother

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch gets a shock when Cam calls a concierge to save his ruined New Year's Day feast, while Phil's dad Frank causes waves when he brings a date. Gloria and Jay have to decide who should take care of little Joe if something should ever happen to them. Guest starring Kelsey Grammer and Fred Willard

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes friends with a new girl at school named Harper, who happens to be extremely wealthy, Homer befriends Harper's father. However, Lisa decides to end the friendship when she realises that Harper is too entitled. With the guest voice of Kristen Bell (The Good Place)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer loses a large sum of money to Broadway legend Laney Fontaine in a poker game and, in order to settle his debt, he lends Lisa to the stage star for a month. Laney transforms Lisa into a showbiz kid, which leaves Homer and Marge wishing they'd never let her go

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfield's first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklater's film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Bart's life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on a selection of the week's TV, with cameras capturing their lively discussions as they sit down to watch the coronation ceremony and concert, The 1% Club, The Greatest Auction, Made in Chelsea and the local elections results on BBC News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gordon, Gino & Fred: Viva España, EastEnders, Top Guns: Inside the RAF, Beat the Chasers, Say Yes to the Dress with Tan France, The Yorkshire Vet, My Floating Home and ITV News coverage of the school concrete crisis. From September 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. Retired dentist Leanne is recently divorced and in search of a sexually experimental man, while former US marine Conor, who falls in love all too easily, is looking for his dream Englishwoman

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying as two guys clash over the same girl. Two more naked newbies get a baptism of fire with a tandem bike ride and while one couple's connection goes from strength to strength, doubts are cast about another relationship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on a selection of the week's TV, with cameras capturing their lively discussions as they sit down to watch the coronation ceremony and concert, The 1% Club, The Greatest Auction, Made in Chelsea and the local elections results on BBC News

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Claire and Haley fall ill at the same time, Phil wages battle against a defective smoke detector after concluding it is saying 'you're not a man' to him. Elsewhere, Manny accidentally gets one of Jay's employees dismissed. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Tony and Ami kick off the competition in East Sussex with an evening of raucous fun, but foodies Chris and Charlene are baffled by the cultural references, and Polish pair Izabella and Michal are left tired from chewing on Ami's rock-solid banoffee pies. Day two sees an international-themed menu being served up, while a menu of hearty cuisine and obscure meats are prepared on the final night

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious moment with Lily during her recent dance recital and goes to extremes to uncover her identity and give her a peace of his mind. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception, and Phil and Gloria are on a college tour with Luke and Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay shows a bit of favouritism when he and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness, while Cam and Mitch try to get Lily, Haley and Sal to stand up to the men in their lives, but things don't turn out as planned

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful DIY project, Phil convinces Jay to invest in a property that he's always wanted to develop. Meanwhile, Claire's newfound love of cooking Sunday dinners hasn't been as successful as she thinks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria gives Claire a birthday experience she will find it hard to forget, while a childhood trauma haunts Cam when he winds up in hospital

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge posts a humorous photo online of Homer eating an ice-cream outside the nuclear plant, prompting Mr Burns to fire him, while a female coder decides to make Lisa her protegee. With the guest voices of Stephen Merchant and Kaitlin Olson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer decides to buy a healthier brand of milk, but Apu persuades him to buy a cheaper sort made by Buzz Cola that is full of hormones, while Bart realises he has a crush on his new teacher Mrs Berrera. With the guest voice of Sofía Vergara (Modern Family)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sanjay's son turns the Kwik-E-Mart into a health-food store against Apu's insistence on tradition. Bart renounces his devotion to pranks after his mischief has unforeseen consequences, but is called upon to return to his wicked ways and take down the new enterprise

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Professor Frink plays matchmaker when he creates an algorithm to make the lonely people of Springfield fall in love. When Marge, Bart, and Lisa visit Grampa for Valentine's Day, they find the old folks in a drug-induced hallucination that lets them relive happy memories

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are so disappointed by the latest Cosmic Wars film that they decide to visit creator Randall Curtis at his ranch in California. Meanwhile, Homer and Marge visit a vineyard - a jaunt that ends with a drunken Homer crashing the car and letting Marge face the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob boss's place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Great British Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, Sex Education, Blankety Blank, Celebrity Race Across the World, Love & Death, and Ambulance

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Don't Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. Six-foot pansexual opera singer Clare is looking for a man as tall as she is, while Jessica, who has a disastrous dating history, hopes to bring out her naughty side

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The whole house is reeling after the shock of the double elimination at the dumping ground, and some of the singletons are struggling to adjust to the changes. Jono and Tiegen go on a messy artistic date and one pair are pushed to breaking point

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Great British Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, Sex Education, Blankety Blank, Celebrity Race Across the World, Love & Death, and Ambulance

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she claims her mother's obsession is 'sad'. However, when she wins the bet, Erica opts out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly has to find a way to win her daughter back to the celebrations. Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Craig and Sofia, who reflect on their Oktoberfest-themed wedding with the bride's best friend James and the groom's sister Emma

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples in Essex and east London compete in the dinner-party challenge, beginning with Spencer and Sara's simple Jewish feast. Reserved pair Lauren and Jack prepare a sophisticated menu reflecting the hosts' heritage in South Africa and Burma. For the final dinner, Paul and Ed opt for a flavourful fare that proves a bit much for those with a fondness for plainer food, and with the contest over, the competitors anxiously wait to discover which party was considered the best

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The singletons are left questioning their existing connections after the first dumping and a game of 'Dare or Bare' ends in floods of tears

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, Race Across the World, Love Is Blind, The Dog Academy, Beef, Outlast, and ITV News coverage of Donald Trump's indictment. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Big mistakes are piling up already. The guests bombard chef Josh with eccentric requests, and a deckhand makes a crazy decision with a jellyfish

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam accidentally gets Barry kicked out of his cool group of friends, so he comes up with a plan to get his brother back in favour by convincing them he has the hacking skills to access the school's computer system to change their grades. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2011, Anna turned wedding planner for her girly bride-to-be Sian. Now they are back - along with Sian's mum Shirley and Anna's best woman Jade - to relive the climactic events

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Fed up with his family's feuding, Jack pleads with Beth, Leah throws a welcome home party for herself and Imran, while two residents get closer

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners compete for the £1,000 prize in the Colchester area, with Yvonne and Neil kicking off the week with a Spanish-themed menu. Tony and Victoria serve up a menu of hearty pub food, but a mix-up in the kitchen leads to a very disappointed guest, and on the final night, Darren and Amy aim to impress with an evening of unprocessed food

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to take their pick from six nude candidates. programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying as two guys clash over the same girl. Two more naked newbies get a baptism of fire with a tandem bike ride and while one couple's connection goes from strength to strength, doubts are cast about another relationship
