programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Claire and Haley fall ill at the same time, Phil wages battle against a defective smoke detector after concluding it is saying 'you're not a man' to him. Elsewhere, Manny accidentally gets one of Jay's employees dismissed. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Tony and Ami kick off the competition in East Sussex with an evening of raucous fun, but foodies Chris and Charlene are baffled by the cultural references, and Polish pair Izabella and Michal are left tired from chewing on Ami's rock-solid banoffee pies. Day two sees an international-themed menu being served up, while a menu of hearty cuisine and obscure meats are prepared on the final night

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious moment with Lily during her recent dance recital and goes to extremes to uncover her identity and give her a peace of his mind. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception, and Phil and Gloria are on a college tour with Luke and Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay shows a bit of favouritism when he and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness, while Cam and Mitch try to get Lily, Haley and Sal to stand up to the men in their lives, but things don't turn out as planned

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful DIY project, Phil convinces Jay to invest in a property that he's always wanted to develop. Meanwhile, Claire's newfound love of cooking Sunday dinners hasn't been as successful as she thinks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria gives Claire a birthday experience she will find it hard to forget, while a childhood trauma haunts Cam when he winds up in hospital

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge posts a humorous photo online of Homer eating an ice-cream outside the nuclear plant, prompting Mr Burns to fire him, while a female coder decides to make Lisa her protegee. With the guest voices of Stephen Merchant and Kaitlin Olson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer decides to buy a healthier brand of milk, but Apu persuades him to buy a cheaper sort made by Buzz Cola that is full of hormones, while Bart realises he has a crush on his new teacher Mrs Berrera. With the guest voice of Sofía Vergara (Modern Family)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sanjay's son turns the Kwik-E-Mart into a health-food store against Apu's insistence on tradition. Bart renounces his devotion to pranks after his mischief has unforeseen consequences, but is called upon to return to his wicked ways and take down the new enterprise

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Professor Frink plays matchmaker when he creates an algorithm to make the lonely people of Springfield fall in love. When Marge, Bart, and Lisa visit Grampa for Valentine's Day, they find the old folks in a drug-induced hallucination that lets them relive happy memories

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are so disappointed by the latest Cosmic Wars film that they decide to visit creator Randall Curtis at his ranch in California. Meanwhile, Homer and Marge visit a vineyard - a jaunt that ends with a drunken Homer crashing the car and letting Marge face the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob boss's place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Craig and Sofia, who reflect on their Oktoberfest-themed wedding with the bride's best friend James and the groom's sister Emma

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples in Essex and east London compete in the dinner-party challenge, beginning with Spencer and Sara's simple Jewish feast. For the final dinner, Paul and Ed opt for a flavourful fare that proves a bit much for those with a fondness for plainer food, and with the contest over, the competitors anxiously wait to discover which party was considered the best

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

Plus, local conservationist Jimmi Hill enlightens John Playfair about owls as they inspect the garden's bird boxes

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for outdoor entertaining and lazy summer days, beginning with a whole seabass with lime and dill butter. Mary then meets experts Jules and Nick to have a go at catching crayfish in the waters of Oxfordshire, before using the crustaceans in an oriental vegetable salad. She then demonstrates simple recipes for lamb burgers with mint mayo, and smoked Texan chicken wings, and finishes with refreshing lemon and elderflower jellies

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of dishes perfect for families, preparing a simple and easy herb flatbread and enlisting the help of two of her older granddaughters to make a chicken and bacon lattice pie. Mary then moves on to a light tuna salad with avocado and lemon mustard dressing and is joined by her grandsons to make cranberry and coconut energy bars. Her final two dishes are ideal for a stress-free Sunday lunch, featuring butterflied leg of lamb, and honeycomb ice-cream

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree works on great new ideas for cooking low carb, preparing grilled pork tenderloin with baby bok choy and roasted shrimp with cherry tomatoes and roasted lemon-chili broccoli

programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present the semi-final in which the amateurs face a trio of patisserie challenges, including a delicate layered slice signature and a regional French classic in the technical. programme.title: Rachel Allen: Bake!

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef and restaurateur Mark Sargeant in Kent, where they cook on the regenerated Folkestone Harbour Arm they and visit a sourdough and beer suppliers located in a shipping container. Mark then takes James on a tour of his Rocksalt restaurant, where he samples the award-winning cuisine before returning to the harbour for one last recipe featuring Folkstone fish

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge shares her recipes for those days when time is at a premium, including tomato soup made from ingredients from the store cupboard and an express bacon and pesto pasta. programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge and food writer demonstrates dishes that are perfect for a party, preparing a Thai chicken curry, and a ham hock terrine. programme.desc: Strange remains are discovered in a 17th-century farming village, and have a disturbing effect on the townsfolk. They form a sinister cult, performing strange and violent rituals to bring their demonic master back to life. However, a pious judge is prepared to use brutal methods of his own to root out the evil. Horror, starring Patrick Wymark, Linda Hayden and Simon Williams

programme.title: Arrowhead (1953)
programme.desc: A cavalry scout witnesses a series of raids by an Apache tribe that is supposedly in peace talks - but his superiors reject his story out of hand and dismiss him from duty. Continuing to spy on the tribe, he comes to suspect the chief's son is behind the attacks. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Jack Palance and Katy Jurado

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk's reunion with an old friend turns sour thanks to the presence of a group of Klingons. When the captain learns the warrior race has meddled in a primitive society, he has to decide whether to ignore Starfleet orders and attack, or keep a low profile and allow the aliens to wreak havoc. William Shatner stars

programme.desc: A New York cop in debt to loan sharks persuades his foster brother and fellow police officer to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network. However, things start to go wrong when a female detective creates rivalry between the pair, and a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans. Action comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes, Jennifer Lopez and Chris Cooper

programme.title: Striking Distance (1993)
programme.desc: A cop refuses to accept the suspect convicted for murdering his father is the real perpetrator of the crime. Meanwhile, his career derails and he is demoted to river patrol. However, his instincts prove accurate as the real criminal resurfaces, hurling him into a race against time to save other innocent lives. Thriller, starring Bruce Willis, Sarah Jessica Parker, Dennis Farina and Tom Sizemore

programme.title: Star Trek

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is furious when his protests are ignored and Barney Miller, the seven million dollar man who experienced a nervous breakdown, is reactivated. It is soon clear the bionic basket-case is not firing on all cylinders when he injures a race-car owner and embarks on a life of crime. Can Steve track him down and put a stop to his misdeeds?

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: Londo's career is placed in jeopardy when an exotic dancer seduces him and steals his secret files. Meanwhile, Garibaldi investigates the unauthorised use of a restricted channel of communication

programme.title: American Made (2017)
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited to act as a courier for the CIA in the 1980s, carrying out covert deliveries from the US to General Noriega's regime in Panama. However, he exploits the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. His dangerous double life takes a darker turn when he is ordered to supply weapons to far-right rebel groups operating in Nicaragua. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Tom Cruise and Domhnall Gleeson

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: The bandana-wearing one-man army has turned his back on violence to live a quiet life in Thailand. But before long he takes up arms once again to rescue a party of missionaries who have been taken captive en route to Burma by a sadistic military officer. Action sequel, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. With Julie Benz and Graham McTavish

programme.desc: A disgraced cop must race against time to save a police chief's daughter from an unhinged suspect as a citizen journalist livestreams his pursuit. Crime thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart and Courtney Eaton

programme.desc: On his release from a prison sentence for crimes of which he was innocent, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency. Crime thriller, starring Karl Urban, Sofia Vergara and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: Londo's career is placed in jeopardy when an exotic dancer seduces him and steals his secret files. Meanwhile, Garibaldi investigates the unauthorised use of a restricted channel of communication

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 63-year-old builder falls from a great height while working on a construction site, and his daughter shares her stories of the sacrifices he made for her. Doctors fear a teenager who has been hit by a car may have sustained brain injuries, while a man who collapsed while playing golf talks about his unconventional upbringing in Kenya and how he had to adapt to fulfill his dreams

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager with anorexia nervosa is rushed into the paediatrics emergency department with dangerously low blood pressure. Her mother reflects on her daughter's lifelong struggle with her eating disorder, and the pain she feels at being unable to protect her child. A 66-year-old man who fell from a great height onto a concrete surface is brought in to St George's, and doctors fear he has sustained organ damage and internal bleeding. His daughter talks about their close relationship and the sacrifices her father has made over the years

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save a grandmother with severe osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her four-month-old grandson. In Stratford, paramedics Mandy Morrice and Michelle Godwin treat a racegoer on a night out who collapsed in the street and suffered a serious head wound. In Warwick, a concerned member of the public calls emergency services to a suspected cardiac arrest but ends up becoming the patient himself. Plus, Neil Vann and Laura Perkins give life-saving treatment to an elderly man found unconscious face down in his hallway

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team take their trolleys down the fruit and veg aisle. Kate Quilton is in Kenya to see how summer vegetables get to British supermarkets in the thick of winter. Jimmy Doherty looks at the measures taken to transport bananas across the UK, John Whaite finds out why supermarket blackberries are so big, Helen Lawal investigates a robot berry-picker in Portugal, and Matt Tebbutt finds out how we can waste less fruit and veg

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A firm traces heirs to the £500,000 estate of a burlesque dancer who performed at Soho's Windmill club throughout the Second World War, while another case uncovers a family's links to a comedy star's radio career. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Birmingham, where Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck, which he is convinced will make some money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of Guest and the City, Dan and Mardi Leonard, welcome their visitors in Brighton, but there is a mixed reaction to the couple's contemporary decor and stained glass windows. The unconventional furniture leaves some guests confused, and one pair of fellow hoteliers bemoan the lack of sausages at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Phil Kiernan invites the contestants to the Farmer's Boy Inn in Longhope, Gloucestershire, where he challenges them to a pie-making competition. However, the task proves less entertaining than the bickering that occurs between two guests as they try to share a kitchen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane Asher host on the Geanna, their purpose-built hotel boat. Dan and Mardi Leonard are concerned space is too tight, while Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa worry about their privacy being invaded. A trip up the Thames allows the guests to sip champagne and get to know the ropes, but the mood at dinner is subdued, and when the owners cook their first breakfast on board they find themselves bickering

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa, who have run the Sentry Mead B&B on the Isle of Wight for six years, play host in the last challenge of the week. The guests arrive with high expectations and after a few setbacks, the dinner and breakfast win everyone over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, performing arts director Anthony plans a theatre-themed menu for his guests, Ross, Tula, Kola and Julie. However, straight-talking Tula tries to steal the show with a candid revelation and Julie brings the house down with some frisky fun at Kola's expense. Anthony's plans go awry in the kitchen, threatening to earn him more rotten earn tomatoes than rave reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salesman Ross hosts the second party from Swansea, but his guests make a discovery that leaves him with some explaining to do, while tension erupts between him and Kola

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social carer Kola provides plenty of hip-hop swagger on the third day of the contest in Swansea, with a Nigerian menu he hopes will both educate and impress his fellow diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Triathlete Tula serves a Spanish-themed menu in Swansea, hoping charm and chorizo can smooth over the dispute between Ross and Julie and avoid a punch-up over the paella

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social worker Julie plans a chilled out slumber party for the final night of the week in Swansea. She cooks a homely menu, but struggles with the pronunciation as well as the preparation of some of her ingredients. At the end of another eventful evening, the winner of the £1,000 prize is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in rural Co Durham at Bowlees Farm Holiday Cottages, where married couple Tony and Viv Smith hope that their tranquil setting, private hot tubs and indoor swimming pool will impress their visitors. Their guests are bowled over by the views and the facilities, but friends Jane and Rachel find fault with the cleanliness in the kitchen. At dinner, it's revealed that breakfast will be provided by the local farm shop, the only facility that Tony and Viv don't seem to have. Despite the clean plates, married couple Amanda and Howard make their feelings clear on the lack of options

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Piebald Inn in Hunmanby, North Yorkshire, where the lack of a thermostat and a divisive design idea irritate some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Stoneleigh House Hotel, a boutique townhouse in the heart of Buckingham run by Jane Parslow and Rachel Rawding. At dinner, the guests are filled in about the Piebald's main attraction, but Jane and Viv don't see 'pie to pie' about a design idea. The group members have a mixed night's sleep, but they all agree about the quality of the breakfast - which is topped off by a surprise from John

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth and final venue is glamping site Evenlode Grounds in the Cotswolds, owned by Howard and Amanda Wooliams, who impress their guests by revealing it is also a working farm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. First up to fire back on their feedback are Tony and Viv, followed by John and Lesley, who are both desperate to know why Jane and Rachel were the only two who wouldn't return to their B&Bs

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Essex and Hertfordshire. Kirstie searches for a family home for couple Justin and Christie, who have spent the first five years of their relationship living 50 miles apart, and are desperate to finally live together and start a family. Phil helps Cara and Ben search for a family home near Bishop's Stortford

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the grand final, as our music maestros are put to the ultimate test. Who will reign supreme and be crowned PopMaster TV champion 2025?

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Shop: A Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: Documentary exploring plans to restore a derelict grocer's shop in Masham, to create an elegant cafe and historic bakery, in a bid to revitalise the town. Joiner Ian Johnson makes a start by restoring the tatty shop front, discovering beautiful period windows and the shop's old 1900s awning hidden under decades of dirt

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is rushed to St George's after being knocked off her bike at a pedestrian crossing, while in Paediatrics, a 12-year-old suffers a wound in his groin after falling from a tree and impaling his leg. An 85-year-old woman brought into urgent care after a fall at home relates her experiences of being evacuated during the Second World War

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman at the airport suffers a suspected miscarriage, but the paramedics sent to her aid have trouble getting her back to hospital due to heavy snowfall. Crews also battle through the roads to treat a woman semi-conscious in police custody with collapsed veins

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is rushed to St George's after being knocked off her bike at a pedestrian crossing, while in Paediatrics, a 12-year-old suffers a wound in his groin after falling from a tree and impaling his leg. Doctors fear a teenager who has been hit by a car may have sustained brain injuries, while a man who collapsed while playing golf talks about his unconventional upbringing in Kenya and how he had to adapt to fulfill his dreams

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team explore the snacks aisle. Kate Quilton visits Kenya to find out how many mangoes are in a snack pack, Helen Lawal learns the mystery of the fluffy centre of a snowball, John Whaite cracks open the secret of caramel popcorn, and Andi Oliver investigates what a supermarket aisle means when you're shopping online

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A company is contacted by a man who is trying to track down the rest of his family after his cousin dies, and the beneficiaries of a Roman Catholic priest's will embark on a journey to learn about his remarkable dedication to his Manchester parish. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Leicestershire, where they meet Bernadette, whose uncle Jim has filled every room with motorbikes, cycles and various other things

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Sylvie welcome their guests to the Watersedge Guest House in Barton-on-Sea, Hampshire, but an afternoon of deer-watching leaves some of them bored. Desperate to impress their fellow B&B owners, the pair host a Hawaiian barbecue, before pulling out all the stops at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Owners Tim and Amelia Whitaker welcome their guests to their non-star-rated boutique accommodation, Nearwater, on the south Cornish coast, and take them out on a boat for a spot of seal watching and diving. However, the sight of wet suits proves too much for one contestant, and tensions also flare over dinner when Mike and Danny are quizzed about their relationship

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eva Buschmann hosts the competition at the Roundhouse Hotel in Weymouth, Dorset. She makes the mistake of assuming Danny Robinson and Mike Gibson are a couple, and offers them a double room with an exposed shower, but hopes a lesson in abstract art and a meal at her favourite harbour-side restaurant will win the other contestants over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike Gibson and Danny Robinson host their rival B&B owners at their four-star guesthouse - Homecliffe Hotel in Blackpool. The hosts take their visitors on a tram ride along the seafront and on to Madame Tussauds, but there are complaints about uncomfortable mattresses and disappointing views and the next day's breakfast fails to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and air their grievances. programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Islands of the Forth: Fortress Islands of the Forth
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island-hopping odyssey, exploring the islands scattered in the Firth of Forth. He discovers these seemingly peaceful islands have a dramatic history of warfare, from medieval English raids on Inchcolm to the first air-raid attack on Britain above Inchgarvie. Paul learns about the strategic importance of Inchkeith's defences during two world wars before heading to the Bass Rock to learn more about the history of prisoners incarcerated on the island, with 160,000 gannets for company

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians reveal how the railways transformed the British diet, rescuing a nation that was struggling to feed itself. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn discover how the mass transportation of livestock gave birth to the traditional British roast, and Ruth Goodman is in Whitby, which became a thriving fishing town thanks to the North Yorkshire Moors Railway supplying its kippers. Plus, Hampshire's watercress line, which brought nutritional salad to the masses, and how the use of steam-powered engines revolutionised production at Britain's oldest brewery

programme.title: Battlefield America
programme.desc: Showcasing the intense fighting and strategic errors in the Battle of Chickamauga that led to significant losses on both sides. Plus, a look at General Grant's Overland Campaign, a series of battles aimed at defeating General Lee's forces. Part three of three

programme.title: Constantine the Great
programme.desc: The first in a two-part profile of the ancient Roman emperor, as archaeologists plot the different stages of his life from Naissus to Rome

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: With access to the first nationwide survey and state-of-the-art drones mapping the Great Wall of China, this documentary offers new evidence that reveals its extraordinary magnitude, rewrites its millennia-long history and decodes its complex signals system. Using cutting-edge chemistry, the programme also finds out what has kept the wall standing for so long - a simple cooking ingredient found in kitchens across the world

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians take a trip on the Flying Scotsman, arguably the most famous locomotive in the world, along its original route connecting London and Edinburgh - the two most important financial capitals of the Empire. Peter Ginn explores how the railways revolutionised the delivery of mail across Britain, he and Alex Langlands learn about the first electronic communication service - more than 100 years before the arrival of email - and Ruth finds out about the role of the wheeltapper. Plus, why do some railway clocks have more than one minute hand?

programme.title: The Civil War's Lost Massacre
programme.desc: The search for remains of formerly enslaved Black Union soldiers brutally murdered by angry Southerners as the Civil War was ending. Plus, a deep dive into Camp Nelson, Kentucky, the military base where these soldiers and thousands of others got their freedom papers

programme.title: Constantine the Great
programme.desc: The concluding episode follows the emperor's archaeological traces to the new Rome, Constantinople, where his claim to power knows no bounds

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of China's Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the country's cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years' experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotland's most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle

programme.title: RAF at 100 with Ewan and Colin McGregor
programme.desc: The actor and his former pilot brother present a celebration of the Royal Air Force's centenary, taking to the skies in iconic planes from the First World War to the present day. They also meet service personnel from throughout the RAF's history, including a veteran of the Battle of Britain, former female members of the Air Transport Auxiliary, crew members who had the responsibility of dropping the atom bomb, modern-day Typhoon fighter crews, and the last pilot to be involved in a dogfight

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Celebrities trace their family trees and uncover facts about their heritage. In the first episode, actress Una Stubbs embarks on a quest to learn about the grandparents she never met. As she delves into their history, she uncovers a surprising connection between her paternal grandfather and the confectionery company she modelled for in the 1950s. Another coincidental link also comes to light - between her forebear's chosen home town of Welwyn Garden City, Hertfordshire, and the area's founder, Ebenezer Howard

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Businessman Adam and his father Ian, who live in a four-bedroom mansion in Essex, swap with single mum Kiptieu, who lives in a small council flat in Abbey Wood, London. With a number of successful businesses under his belt, Adam now travels round the world, interviewing the great and the good from showbusiness, sport and business, including the likes of John Travolta, 50 Cent and Floyd Mayweather, sharing their stories of success with clients who are willing to pay Adam thousands for the inside track. Kiptieu fled war-torn Sierra Leone and is a widow bringing up her three daughters in a two-bedroom ground-floor flat. Kiptieu also recently lost her job because of the Covid-19 pandemic, so the family budget is tighter than ever

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted

Neven's next stop is the seaside village of Craster, home of the Craster Kipper. Here, he meets Neil Robson, who operates the last remaining kipper smokehouse in the area with his family

programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon and quantity surveyor Claire Irwin help empty nesters Deirdre and Kieran Kelly at Clonsilla in west Dublin. The couple are hoping to downsize from their spacious existing home to their beloved first home. To give Deirdre and Kieran the space they need, Dermot sets out to combine inside and outside with a triple-zoned ground floor, a glass corner extension and clever landscaping

programme.title: Maigret
programme.desc: A student is stabbed to death in the street. Maigret digs into the killer's psychology. Countess Sophie calls, fearing for her life

programme.title: Turbulence - The Story of Ryanair
programme.desc: The story of Ryanair's 40-year ascension from a single route airline that challenged the likes of Aer Lingus to a giant of European aviation, with input from insiders, commentators and former staff

programme.title: All That Remains with Niall Breslin
programme.desc: The rugby player-turned-academic and mental health advocate sets out on an emotional quest to remember more than 1,300 people buried in unmarked graves in the grounds of the former St Loman's psychiatric hospital in his native Mullingar. He uncovers stories of adults and children who were committed, died and buried under numbered metal crosses without names. Today, even those crosses have been removed. He explores the burial practices of patients unclaimed after death and investigates how many more institutional graveyards there are like this around the country - and what can be done to respect and protect them

programme.title: Masters: Keepers of Tradition
programme.desc: A look at Irish practitioners of rare, traditional and remarkable crafts and skills, starting with one of the country's finest stone carvers, Julia Gebel. She first arrived in Ireland from Germany to work on the restoration of Cormac's Chapel at the Rock of Cashel, the ancient seat of the Kings of Munster. Here she takes on a commission for a bust of Irish revolutionary Dick Barrett

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie Molloy explores more of Ireland's most reasonably priced homes, joined by building engineer Kieran McCarthy, who advises house hunters about the condition of the properties. They begin by heading to Carlow to help find a home for civil servant Laura, who wants to escape the rising costs of Dublin

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Harrison Gardner is in Westmeath, helping Rose and Marguax as they renovate a stone cottage - a project that includes building a timber-framed extension - while also handling the pressure and excitement of expecting their first baby

programme.title: Hooked
programme.desc: Dr Brian Pennie lifts the lid on how modern addictions are rewiring people's brains, and asks what they can do to break free. In the first episode, Dr Pennie focuses on phones, gaming and gambling, interwoven with his personal story of going from heroin addiction to becoming a neuroscientist and lecturer at Trinity College Dublin

programme.title: The End of the World with Beanz
programme.desc: People have always cared about their appearance, but in the age of social media, many seem to be in the pursuit of perfection. Martin Beanz Warde is joined by actress Norma Sheahan to explore the ever increasing pursuit of physical perfection, a journey that sees one of them try botox for the first time. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Melanie Chisholm - aka Sporty Spice - researches her family tree. Both sides of Melanie's family come from Liverpool and the singer is fascinated to discover her great-grandmother was a moneylender, while her fourth great-grandfather was a campaigner seeking to improve working men's lives and rights. Melanie is keen to explore a family rumour about an Irish connection, and before long learns that some of her ancestors fled the famine in Ireland

programme.title: Thelma & Louise (1991)
programme.desc: Two world-weary friends flee their dull dead end lives for a weekend road trip. However, when they kill a would-be rapist in self-defence, they make a fateful decision to run from the law, sparking a chain of events destined to end in tragedy. Ridley Scott's drama, starring Geena Davis, Susan Sarandon, Harvey Keitel, Michael Madsen and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Though the team members are looking forward to welcoming a new recruit into their midst, Mervin, in contrast, cannot wait to get away from the island. However, before he catches his flight, he becomes embroiled in the murder of a young man whose body has been recovered from a ravine. The case becomes more compelling when it is discovered the victim has left behind a mysterious message. Drama, starring Don Gilet and Don Warrington

programme.title: All That Remains with Niall Breslin
programme.desc: The rugby player-turned-academic and mental health advocate sets out on an emotional quest to remember more than 1,300 people buried in unmarked graves in the grounds of the former St Loman's psychiatric hospital in his native Mullingar. He uncovers stories of adults and children who were committed, died and buried under numbered metal crosses without names. Today, even those crosses have been removed. He explores the burial practices of patients unclaimed after death and investigates how many more institutional graveyards there are like this around the country - and what can be done to respect and protect them

programme.title: Masters: Keepers of Tradition
programme.desc: A look at Irish practitioners of rare, traditional and remarkable crafts and skills, starting with one of the country's finest stone carvers, Julia Gebel. She first arrived in Ireland from Germany to work on the restoration of Cormac's Chapel at the Rock of Cashel, the ancient seat of the Kings of Munster. Here she takes on a commission for a bust of Irish revolutionary Dick Barrett

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie Molloy explores more of Ireland's most reasonably priced homes, joined by building engineer Kieran McCarthy, who advises house hunters about the condition of the properties. They begin by heading to Carlow to help find a home for civil servant Laura, who wants to escape the rising costs of Dublin

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Harrison Gardner is in Westmeath, helping Rose and Marguax as they renovate a stone cottage - a project that includes building a timber-framed extension - while also handling the pressure and excitement of expecting their first baby

programme.title: Hooked
programme.desc: Dr Brian Pennie lifts the lid on how modern addictions are rewiring people's brains, and asks what they can do to break free. In the first episode, Dr Pennie focuses on phones, gaming and gambling, interwoven with his personal story of going from heroin addiction to becoming a neuroscientist and lecturer at Trinity College Dublin

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Melanie Chisholm - aka Sporty Spice - researches her family tree. Both sides of Melanie's family come from Liverpool and the singer is fascinated to discover her great-grandmother was a moneylender, while her fourth great-grandfather was a campaigner seeking to improve working men's lives and rights. Melanie is keen to explore a family rumour about an Irish connection, and before long learns that some of her ancestors fled the famine in Ireland

programme.title: Guy Ritchie's The Covenant (2023)
programme.desc: When a sergeant is injured during the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks his own life to carry him across miles of unforgiving terrain to safety. Drama, starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Dar Salim, Sean Sagar and Jonny Lee Miller

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favourite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her from the perpetrators. American naval crime drama, starring Gary Cole and Sean Murray

programme.title: Amandaland
programme.desc: Anne organises a camping trip to the New Forest but what should be a wholesome weekend away ends up being a nightmare including snakes, drugs and UTIs. Johannes rubs Mal up the wrong way and Della has to deal with a disaster at the restaurant

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: Mexico v South Africa (Kick-off 8.00pm). Joanne Cantwell presents coverage of the Group A match at Mexico City Stadium, which serves as the opening game of the tournament. This is the fifth overall meeting between these nations, with the most recent also being the opening contest of the 2010 World Cup in South Africa, which ended in a 1-1 draw. That was the last time Bafana Bafana competed in a World Cup and, as with their two other tournament appearances in 1998 and 2002, they failed to progress beyond the group stage, whereas El Tricolor finished second in the group to progress to the last-16, where they were beaten 3-1 by Argentina. Last time out in Qatar they failed to progress from a group that also included Argentina, Poland and Saudi Arabia, and their best-ever performances in the 17 previous appearances saw them reach the quarter-final stage as sole hosts in both 1970 and 1986

programme.title: Tony Cascarino: Extra Time
programme.desc: Documentary charting the highs and lows of Tony Cascarino's 20 years in football. The former trainee hairdresser from Kent became a hero to millions of Irishmen and a star at the biggest football club in France. But there were scandals too. Here, Cascarino discusses the marital infidelities, the suspected doping and bribery allegations, and the abuse he received from his own fans

programme.title: Twitter: Breaking the Bird
programme.desc: The inside story of the tech entrepreneurs who created the social media app Twitter. At first the site grew on the back of celebrities who realised it offered them a direct way to communicate with fans. After going global, it seemed to be fulfilling the founders' dream of a digital utopia where all voices would be heard. But as hate speech and misinformation flooded the platform, the founders faced growing problems to control it - and the sale to Elon Musk in 2022 represented the end of their dream

programme.title: Amandaland
programme.desc: Anne organises a camping trip to the New Forest but what should be a wholesome weekend away ends up being a nightmare including snakes, drugs and UTIs. Johannes rubs Mal up the wrong way and Della has to deal with a disaster at the restaurant

programme.title: How Ireland Rocked the 80s

programme.title: Futureville Ireland

programme.title: Aistear an Amhráin

programme.title: Anorexia, My Family & Me
programme.desc: Angela Scanlon narrates this documentary delving into the lives of three families grappling with the profound effects of eating disorders. At the heart of the film is Wicklow mum Jenny, who is fighting tirelessly to secure treatment for her 16-year-old son Josh, who is consistently losing weight as he battles the devastating grip of anorexia. Others featured are 42-year-old father of four Sean, who has battled anorexia for over a decade, and 36-year-old Amanda, who lives with the debilitating daily reality of anorexia

programme.desc: Naomi is sent to the countryside to spend the summer with her grandmother. She's unhappy and isolated, spending all her time indoors on her tablet rather than trying to make friends. But one day Naomi discovers her neighbour Sam has been taken over by an alien called Glitch who wants to experience life on earth for one day. When other aliens from Sam's race show up to drag her back to her boring, sterile world, she becomes swept up in an adventure. Together, the two of them spend a day together avoiding capture and having fun

programme.title: Total Football
programme.desc: Meeting the young players of Ringmahon Rangers FC, home to Caoimhín Kelleher, while David MC goes behind the scenes of the LOI and Leo Barns joins the show

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lacey tells John that she doesn't want to work for Tane because he broke her sister's heart. Sonny and Dana throw a birthday party for Archie

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: Mexico v South Africa (Kick-off 8.00pm). Joanne Cantwell presents coverage of the Group A match at Mexico City Stadium, which serves as the opening game of the tournament. This is the fifth overall meeting between these nations, with the most recent also being the opening contest of the 2010 World Cup in South Africa, which ended in a 1-1 draw. That was the last time Bafana Bafana competed in a World Cup and, as with their two other tournament appearances in 1998 and 2002, they failed to progress beyond the group stage, whereas El Tricolor finished second in the group to progress to the last-16, where they were beaten 3-1 by Argentina. Last time out in Qatar they failed to progress from a group that also included Argentina, Poland and Saudi Arabia, and their best-ever performances in the 17 previous appearances saw them reach the quarter-final stage as sole hosts in both 1970 and 1986

programme.title: Tony Cascarino: Extra Time
programme.desc: Documentary charting the highs and lows of Tony Cascarino's 20 years in football. The former trainee hairdresser from Kent became a hero to millions of Irishmen and a star at the biggest football club in France. But there were scandals too. Here, Cascarino discusses the marital infidelities, the suspected doping and bribery allegations, and the abuse he received from his own fans

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favourite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her from the perpetrators. American naval crime drama, starring Gary Cole and Sean Murray

programme.title: Changing Planet

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: South Korea v Czechia (Kick-off 3.00am). Coverage of the Group A match at Guadalajara Stadium in Mexico. The Koreans are appearing at their 11th tournament in succession, and a 12th overall, and qualified after going unbeaten in 16 total matches in two rounds of qualifying in the Asian Confederation. Their best-ever performance at a World Cup saw them finish fourth in 2002 when they served as co-hosts alongside Japan, but since then they have failed to progress beyond the last-16, which was as far as they went four years ago in Qatar after suffering a 4-1 loss to Brazil in Doha. For Czechia, this is their first appearance at a World Cup since 2006 in Germany, and they were made to work hard for their place as they finished second in their qualifying group behind Croatia, which led to a place in the play-offs where they triumphed twice in penalty shootouts against Republic of Ireland and Denmark after both games ended in 2-2 draws

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament, but Egg advises him to hold on to his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After Egg attempts to train Dunk's stubborn horse, the knight teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourney's first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: After receiving discouraging news about the Met, Bertha deals with rumours that are swirling around about Larry. Fearing her sister's disapproval, Ada asks Marian to cover for her as she continues to see Mr Forte. Bertha vies for position with the visiting Duke of Buckingham, and, in Tuskegee, Peggy navigates a tense dinner with Mr Fortune and Booker T Washington in Tuskegee

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: After sharing her news, Ada questions moving ahead without Agnes's support, while Peggy experiences the dangers of the South

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Georgia Rae Mahoney makes more enemies in the homicide squad, and pushes one of them too far. Dr Cox recounts an odd story

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ballard and Gharty investigate when a priest is stabbed to death in his own rectory, but allegations of sexual abuse complicate the case

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddon's plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixham's Crab Festival

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After learning her longtime signature scent is being discontinued, Deborah prompts an unexpected detour, where she has a shaky reunion with former comedian friend Susan. Meanwhile, Kayla surprises Jimmy by stepping up at work. Jean Smart stars

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When Deborah grows increasingly frustrated over her new material's missing 'spark', Kiki, Ava and her mother Nina take Deborah out for a girls' night. As Ava attempts to connect with her mother, Deborah embraces some unexpected company. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Maeve and Caleb attempt to escape Temperance with their lives. Meanwhile, Bernard and the resistance search for a weapon in the desert

programme.title: Deadwood

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The smallpox virus threatens the very existence of the inhabitants of Deadwood, as it engulfs the entire town and leaves no one well enough to go and get any medicine. Meanwhile, Swearengen is still after Alma's gold claim

programme.title: The Regime
programme.desc: When Zubak uncovers Keplinger's location, Elena works to minimise the outcome of a tragic accident. The chancellor and Nicholas leave the palace to meet factory workers, while Agnes faces a test of loyalty when presented with an offer from an unknown source

programme.desc: Maritime Inn landlady Pat gets her first full house of the season as Brixham's tourist trade picks up for the summer - but refuses to hire anyone to help her with the extra work. Powerboat instructor Mike Weatherbee tries to enforce the laws of the sea, carpet-cleaner Dave Satchwill prepares to lead the town's popular ghost tour, and lone fisherman Dave Brown reveals his unusual methods

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah and Ava struggle to stay out of one another's orbits - especially when Deborah lands an unexpected opportunity after finally agreeing to appear on Late Night. Marcus transforms a cottage into 'Vance's House'. Comedy, starring Jean Smart, Paul W Downs and Megan Stalter

programme.title: Mad Max 2 (1981)
programme.desc: A former cop haunted by his tragic past roams the wasteland of Australia in the aftermath of a nuclear war. He arrives at a besieged settlement and grudgingly helps protect the residents from a horde of marauding bikers who want to get hold of their valuable supply of petrol. Futuristic adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Bruce Spence, Vernon Wells, Emil Minty and Kjell Nilsson

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor

programme.title: Detroit (2017)
programme.desc: A group of rogue police officers responds to a complaint with apparent retribution rather than justice in mind, launching a raid on a group of African-Americans. Public anger reaches a peak after the incident, as relationships sour with authority. Fact-based drama set during the 1967 Detroit riots, starring John Boyega, Anthony Mackie and Algee Smith

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket (1987)
programme.desc: Raw recruits undergo harsh training under a domineering Marine drill sergeant after being called up for service in the Vietnam War, but his brutal methods lead to the breakdown of one of his cadets. Eventually, some of the fully trained soldiers get their first taste of combat in 1968. Stanley Kubrick's drama, starring Matthew Modine, Adam Baldwin, Vincent D'Onofrio and R Lee Ermey

programme.title: The Shining (1980)
programme.desc: A writer takes a caretaking job at a remote mountain hotel. It has closed for the winter, and he has been hired to get the place ready for the next season. But evil spirits haunting its corridors destroy his sanity, causing the unhinged author to rampage through the hotel and terrorise his wife and young son. Stanley Kubrick's horror, based on the Stephen King novel, with Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd and Scatman Crothers

programme.title: Mulholland Drive (2001)
programme.desc: An actress arrives home to find a mysterious woman in her room who is suffering from amnesia. She sets out with the stranger to discover how she got there - but the trail quickly leads to intrigue, blackmail and murder. David Lynch's mystery, starring Naomi Watts, Justin Theroux, Laura Harring and Robert Forster

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: The Fifth Element (1997)
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, the world faces destruction from a seemingly unstoppable force of pure evil. Meanwhile, a New York cab driver encounters a mysterious woman destined to save the Earth from its fate, and has to protect her from a scheming arms dealer and a horde of alien mercenaries. Luc Besson's sci-fi adventure, starring Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: An engineer carries out a top-secret job on the understanding that his knowledge of the task will be erased from his mind afterwards to protect his employer's intellectual property. However, waking after the memory-wiping procedure, he is shocked to learn he had somehow agreed to waive the huge payment due to him - and is wanted for a murder he does not remember committing. John Woo's thriller, starring Ben Affleck, Uma Thurman and Aaron Eckhart

programme.title: American Gangster (2007)
programme.desc: The story of 1970s drug kingpin Frank Lucas, whose innovative methods of smuggling heroin into the US made him one of the leading figures in the New York underworld. A detective is assigned to bring Lucas's empire down, but his investigation is undermined by police corruption. Ridley Scott's fact-based crime drama, starring Denzel Washington, Russell Crowe, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome (1985)
programme.desc: The nomadic warrior pitches up in the city of a cut-throat desert community in search of his stolen vehicle and ends up making a deal with a local dictator to get rid of her rival for power. However, when the bargain turns sour, he is cast out into the wilderness - where he becomes the unlikely protector of a tribe of feral youngsters. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Tina Turner and Bruce Spence

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: After Yang (2022)
programme.desc: When his young daughter's beloved companion, an android named Yang, malfunctions, a man called Jake searches for a way to repair him. In the process, Jake discovers the life that has been passing in front of him, reconnecting with his wife and daughter across a distance he didn't know was there. Sci-fi drama, starring Colin Farrell and Jodie Turner-Smith

programme.title: After Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A spaceship crash leaves a renowned war hero and his 13-year-old son stranded on Earth, which was abandoned by the human race centuries ago. Since mankind's departure, the planet has become home to all manner of dangerous life-forms, and the boy must make a desperate journey across hostile terrain to secure a rescue for his injured father. Sci-fi adventure, starring Will and Jaden Smith, with Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: The Fifth Element (1997)
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, the world faces destruction from a seemingly unstoppable force of pure evil. Meanwhile, a New York cab driver encounters a mysterious woman destined to save the Earth from its fate, and has to protect her from a scheming arms dealer and a horde of alien mercenaries. programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: A Texan hunter who took a stash of money abandoned at the site of a botched drug deal is pursued across the state by an implacable hitman with no qualms about killing anyone who gets in his way. Meanwhile, a world-weary sheriff struggles to make sense of the escalating chain of violence. The Coen brothers' Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Josh Brolin, Javier Bardem, Tommy Lee Jones, Kelly Macdonald and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Gladiator II (2024)
programme.desc: After losing his home, Lucius, the son of a slain Roman General, is forced to enter the Colosseum in an attempt to bring glory back to Rome. Ridley Scott's historical drama sequel, starring Paul Mescal, Pedro Pascal and Denzel Washington, with Connie Nielsen and Derek Jacobi reprising their roles from the first film

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: After Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A spaceship crash leaves a renowned war hero and his 13-year-old son stranded on Earth, which was abandoned by the human race centuries ago. Since mankind's departure, the planet has become home to all manner of dangerous life-forms, and the boy must make a desperate journey across hostile terrain to secure a rescue for his injured father. Sci-fi adventure, starring Will and Jaden Smith, with Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Mousehunt (1997)
programme.desc: Two destitute brothers stand to make a fortune by auctioning off the family home, but before the sale can be finalised they face the task of evicting its resident mouse. However, the resourceful rodent would rather stay put, and outwits their every bungling attempt to oust it. Slapstick comedy, starring Lee Evans, Nathan Lane and Christopher Walken

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: One Last Deal (2026)
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent scrambles to land one last high-stakes deal for his star client, with both their futures on the line. Drama, starring Danny Dyer and Elliott Rogers

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge (2025)
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Finland reluctantly cedes territory to the invading Red Army. Former Army commando Aatami Korpi is among the affected and returns to his family plot to deconstruct his timber-framed home and relocate the wooden beams on a truck across the new border separating the Soviet Union and Finland. The legend of the 'the man who refuses to die' remains a thorn in the side of the Soviet army, and a nameless KGB officer agrees to liberate high-ranking brute Igor Draganov from a Siberian prison in exchange for killing Aatami. Finnish action sequel, starring Jorma Tommila, Stephen Lang and Richard Brake

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Pharaohs at War
programme.sub-title: Ramses II - The Battle of Kadesh
programme.desc: The Battle of Kadesh, fought in 1275 BCE between the Egyptian Empire led by pharaoh Ramesses II and the Hittite Empire led by king Muwatalli II. In one of the world's largest chariot battles, fought beside the Orontes River, Ramses sought to wrest Canaan and Syria from the Hittites and recapture the city of Kadesh. There was a day of carnage as approximately 5,000 chariots charged into the fray, but no outright victor. Ultimately, the battle led to the world's first recorded peace treaty

programme.sub-title: Rhys Jones: Death of an Innocent
programme.desc: A documentary on the death of Rhys Jones, an 11-year-old who was shot and killed while walking home from football practice in Croxteth, Liverpool, in August 2007. The assailant was 18-year-old Sean Mercer, who was firing at rival gang members and hit the child in the process. An investigation to bring Mercer and his gang to justice created tension in the area and caused untold pain to the family, but the perpetrator was eventually sentenced to 22 years behind bars and six other gang members were also jailed

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitler's invasion of the Soviet Union on June 22, 1941. His aim was to weaken Britain in Europe and gain 'lebensraum', or living space, in the East. The Nazi regime gradually advanced its so-called 'final solution to the Jewish problem' culminating in the appalling events associated with the Holocaust

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: There is power in the debate of the true origins of humanity and it became the fixation of a nefarious power as Heinrich Himmler, leader of the Nazi's SS, when he turned his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Fritz Todt was the man tasked with the Nazis' engineering projects, including the autobahn and the West Wall defences. In 1942, he died under mysterious circumstances

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The idea that aliens may have given human brains incredible untapped abilities. Experts ask whether harnessing these hidden powers could spark the next step in man's evolution.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Nestled in Utah lies a ranch some believe to be a hotbed of strange phenomena. The documentary considers whether it could be connected to an alien entity known as the Skinwalker

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.sub-title: Rhys Jones: Death of an Innocent
programme.desc: A documentary on the death of Rhys Jones, an 11-year-old who was shot and killed while walking home from football practice in Croxteth, Liverpool, in August 2007. The assailant was 18-year-old Sean Mercer, who was firing at rival gang members and hit the child in the process. An investigation to bring Mercer and his gang to justice created tension in the area and caused untold pain to the family, but the perpetrator was eventually sentenced to 22 years behind bars and six other gang members were also jailed

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: An extraordinary lake in Canada that may hold the key to whether life exists on Mars. Plus, a Second World War aerial photo possibly containing a coded message left by a vicious Elizabethan religious fanatic and a bizarre six-mile-long scar that appeared in the Australian Outback overnight

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a satellite image reveals a lost jungle in the heart of Africa, scientists embark on a dangerous voyage in search of undiscovered species. A satellite captures an image of a ghost town rising out of the water of an Argentinian lake

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A satellite captures an eerie image of a perfectly round island rotating within a perfectly round lake in the middle of a supposedly haunted Argentinian swamp. An impenetrable stone labyrinth in Madagascar is rumoured to harbour dozens of undiscovered species

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Scott pays top dollar for a mechanical rooster in Nova Scotia and two treasures are found inside a decrepit storage barn

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Tattoos, piercings and body modifications are big business. This edition considers whether man's desire for these alterations stem from a profound link to his ancestors

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Police officers and witnesses reflect on David Copeland's series of nail bomb attacks in 1999, when blasts around London killed three people and injured more than 100

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: A look at the tactics employed to pass strategically important ships under the nose of the enemy, and the use of intelligence to carry out naval attacks

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. The survivors and the winners from the war wanted to blame the Germans. No one knew whether the Germans had really broken with the Nazis

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road to trawl Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics to restore and sell on for a tidy profit - this time they head for Mark's shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets before travelling to an auction in Tewkesbury hoping for something bigger to take to their second Kempton autojumble.

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Musketoon Operation, a daring, small-scale commando raid on a German-held electricity generating station at Glomfjord in Norway, carried out by British and Norwegian commandos in September 1942. The mission involved a submarine crossing, an overland route and the destruction of the power plant

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Raincoat, a 1943 mission conducted in Italy to break through the German defence line and open the way to and liberate Rome. Allied artillery was tasked with creating a diversion while the soldiers advanced
