programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Operation Frankton, of December 1942. The mission was for Royal Marines to place limpet mines on German ships in the occupied Bordeaux Harbour, 62 miles along the Gironde River. Five cockleshell canoes set off from submarine HMS Tuna at the mouth of the river. Only two reached the harbour and carried out the raid, escaping with the aid of the French Resistance. The damage to the ships and the resulting disruption to German supply lines had a significant impact on the war effort

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Lyle convinces Karen to marry him in Las Vegas, where she bumps into Jennifer Lopez - and persuades her to sing at their wedding. She also meets her fiance's strangely affectionate brother, while Leo returns from Cambodia with bad news for Will. First in a two-part series finale, also guest starring John Cleese, Tim Curry and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rosario causes a stir on the dance floor, while Will tries to persuade Leo to tell Grace the truth. Lyle's eloquent speech at the reception does not receive the response he anticipated from Karen, and Jack is stunned by an offer from Jennifer Lopez. Guest starring John Cleese, Harry Connick Jr and Tim Curry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a father-son relationship in a 1980s sitcom, using it as a source of inspiration to deal with Bart's hankering for a must-have mini-bike. However, when the youngster starts trading nuclear secrets with the Chinese government, Homer must find a new way to bring his son into line

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa notices how a patch of wild flowers has a calming effect on two aggressive scorpions, and discovers it has a similar impact on Springfield's human population. A pharmaceutical company soon gets involved, leaving Bart to spot a potential money-making scheme

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: As vet Phil handles some prickly patients, rescuer Chantel extracts a sooty possum duo from a chimney and vet Meaghan unhooks the catch of the day

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The cops are puzzled by the murder of a wealthy couple and a missing artefact linked to the Royal League, a long-forgotten secret society. A conspiracy theorist (played by Jorge Garcia, Lost) thinks he knows what's going on, but should he be trusted? Meanwhile, Catherine spends her last day with the Navy. Alex O'Loughlin, Scott Caan and Michelle Borth star

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a petty officer is found dead with an apparent suicide note, the team must investigate the mystery surrounding his death. Meanwhile, Callen and Anna begin wedding planning and Sam has a heart-to-heart with his daughter

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo is reeling from the aftermath of his decision to speak out to the press and relocates to a quiet town in Mexico to reassess his life and professional future, only to find himself reluctantly drawn into one local family's fight for justice. Return of the crime drama, starring Shemar Moore

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo is still in Mexico and teams up with a local cop for a dangerous rescue mission, while back in Los Angeles, Hicks considers disbanding the team for good

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa gets her hands on a collection of keys to every door in Springfield, and soon uncovers a hidden classroom beneath the school, telling Principal Skinner about her discovery. He confiscates the key from her, but she remains determined to investigate the mysterious room

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Marge and Homer are invited on a weekend away at the Jersey Shore to smooth over their differences with Fat Tony and Selma, who have married after a whirlwind romance. Bart discovers a talent for detecting the location of truffles, which Lisa jumps at the chance to nurture

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: The employees are excited when international promos for the documentary surface, but they are soon horrified to discover how much candid filming has taken place. Meanwhile, Jim and Darryl have a big meeting with baseball player Ryan Howard, who pitches a bizarre sci-fi sports movie about himself

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Dwight shoots Stanley with a bull tranquiliser after he refuses to go on a sales call, while Jim and Pam head to marriage counselling. Elsewhere, the Senator comes out of the closet, and Andy tries to find a talent agent

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders embarks on a whirlwind romance with Mrs Krabappel after he saves the schoolteacher's life when she tried to escape a detention room at Springfield Elementary. However, things start to unravel when she reveals how many men she has slept with - a list that includes Homer and Aerosmith drummer Joey Krammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The 28th season of the animated comedy kicks off with an episode that sees Mr Burns put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl in exchange for rebuilding the town after it is burned to the ground. With the guest voice of Amy Schumer

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist learns about the sharks of the Indian Ocean, which despite finding ways to adapt to the environment, face threats from climate change, pollution and overfishing

programme.title: From
programme.desc: As Tabitha and Jade's troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town, while Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory

programme.title: Evil
programme.desc: Sister Andrea joins the team to fix a demonically possessed marriage

programme.title: Bear Grylls Is Running Wild
programme.desc: Bear takes actress Elizabeth Banks on a thrilling journey through a frigid wilderness, navigating the challenges posed by a melting glacier and the icy waters that surround it

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: In solving the murders of two teenagers killed in a burning building, Nick is forced into an uneasy alliance with the Wesen who murdered Monroe's friend to crack the case of a serial arsonist with the power to generate intense heat. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn reveals to everyone that the barn is full of captured walkers - news that infuriates Shane, who decides they all need to be destroyed. Dale tries to hide the group's weapons in the woods to prevent a conflict, but ultimately fails and the arms cache is taken back to base. Meanwhile, Rick and Hershel return with two more captives, planning to keep them alive, but this pushes Shane over the edge and he forces the survivors into a bloody confrontation

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Roma and Ronnie are shocked when a driver in Slough, Berkshire, records the highest reading they have ever seen in a breathalyser test, and Chris captures an innovative supermarket thief. programme.title: Brazil Untamed
programme.desc: In the heart of the Pantanal wetlands lies a region so remote that it is almost entirely unvisited. Three hundred pig-like peccaries call this unique place their home

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.sub-title: Okavango: The Lifeblood of the Kalahari
programme.desc: A look at the Okavango Delta, one of Africa's most abundant and diverse wildlife areas

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: Using CGI, archive footage and science, to witness how creatures from deep seas to land predators hunt, survive and dominate nature. From prehistoric predator to modern king, this edition follows the lion's epic rise. Science reveals fierce battles, tight bonds and the brutal tactics behind Africa's most iconic hunter

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: A look at the ecosystems of six islands, examining how the geology and origins of each have forced the animals that evolved there to interact as they do nowhere else. The first edition looks at the flora and fauna of Canada's Vancouver Island

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Staff decide that orangutan 'Big Boy' Beni needs to lose weight, and Clara and her baby Clarita face a return to island life now the pair have been reunited. Meanwhile, Jungle School welcomes an extraordinary new pupil, Alba, the world's only reported albino orangutan, and vets attempt to round up a group of older orangutans for release

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: As the dry season takes hold in Luangwa Valley, lagoons dry up and verdant grasslands gradually turn to dust. Animals must take advantage while they can

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: An unusual colony of penguins on the south-western tip of Africa, driven there by human interference on their island homes

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a tasty treat of corn for the chimps, but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While there's more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam. There's an emotional milestone in the life of disabled chimp Chocolate.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga sets out to rescue a newly orphaned one-year-old orangutan from a remote village, but when she arrives back at the school, the orphan is found to have a broken wrist. The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. 'Big Boy' Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: The documentary about the Luangwa Valley considers how the life of every animal is linked to the vastly different seasons - the wet and the dry

programme.title: Zambia Untamed
programme.desc: The dry season welcomes thousands of animals to the Acacia Loop as they search for food. There, each species battles to find its place in the pecking order

programme.title: Into the Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: The flat savannahs of the Llanos face seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving land, animals don't get a second chance

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: The crocodiles that are to be found lurking in the waterways of Queensland and the Northern Territory, one of Australia's most successful - and deadly - creatures

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a tasty treat of corn for the chimps, but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While there's more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam. There's an emotional milestone in the life of disabled chimp Chocolate.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga sets out to rescue a newly orphaned one-year-old orangutan from a remote village, but when she arrives back at the school, the orphan is found to have a broken wrist. The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. 'Big Boy' Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank (2022)
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound named Hank finds himself in a town full of cats, who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's evil plot to wipe their village off the map. With help from a reluctant teacher to train him, Hank must assume the role of town samurai and team up with the villagers to save the day. Animated comedy, with the voices of Michael Cera, Ricky Gervais and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Sneaks (2024)
programme.desc: Ty is a designer trainer who lives a life of luxury and comfort. However, when a shady shoe collector steals his sister, Ty, is forced to venture out into the world, and onto the streets of New York, to rescue her. Animated comedy, with the voices of Anthony Mackie, Keith David and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Monster Family (2017)
programme.desc: A young family is cursed by a witch and transformed into monsters. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: Monster Family 2 (2021)
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter, so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire, Frankenstein's monster, a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them. Animated comedy, with the voices of Emily Watson, Jason Isaacs and Nick Frost

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Antz (1998)
programme.desc: A neurotic worker ant passes himself off as a soldier to impress a princess. However, he provokes a jealously ambitious general with an accidental act of heroism - so he and his beloved decide to flee the brutal colony and go in search of the promised land of Insectopia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Woody Allen, Sharon Stone, Gene Hackman and Sylvester Stallone

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: Happy Feet (2006)
programme.desc: A young penguin disappoints his fellow seabirds with his inability to sing - but instead he displays a remarkable talent for tap dancing. However, his elders refuse to accept this outlandish behaviour and send the youngster into exile, marking the start of a wonderful journey. Animated adventure, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Nicole Kidman and Hugh Jackman

programme.title: Happy Feet Two (2011)
programme.desc: A tap-dancing penguin goes searching for his missing son, but his search leads him to discover a drifting iceberg that threatens to destroy his colony. He sets out to unite all the birds in the Antarctic to avert the catastrophe. Animated musical comedy sequel, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Ava Acres and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Antz (1998)
programme.desc: A neurotic worker ant passes himself off as a soldier to impress a princess. However, he provokes a jealously ambitious general with an accidental act of heroism - so he and his beloved decide to flee the brutal colony and go in search of the promised land of Insectopia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Woody Allen, Sharon Stone, Gene Hackman and Sylvester Stallone

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)

programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyong'o, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Riverdance: The Animated Adventure (2021)
programme.desc: An Irish boy named Keegan and a Spanish girl named Moya journey into the mythical world of the legendary Megaloceros Giganteus, who teach them to appreciate Riverdance as a celebration of life. Family animation, with the voices of Sam Hardy, Hannah Herman Cortes, Pierce Brosnan and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: Happy Feet (2006)
programme.desc: A young penguin disappoints his fellow seabirds with his inability to sing - but instead he displays a remarkable talent for tap dancing. However, his elders refuse to accept this outlandish behaviour and send the youngster into exile, marking the start of a wonderful journey. Animated adventure, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Nicole Kidman and Hugh Jackman

programme.title: Happy Feet Two (2011)
programme.desc: A tap-dancing penguin goes searching for his missing son, but his search leads him to discover a drifting iceberg that threatens to destroy his colony. He sets out to unite all the birds in the Antarctic to avert the catastrophe. Animated musical comedy sequel, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Ava Acres and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath

programme.title: The Boss Baby (2017)
programme.desc: A youngster believes his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life. However, the duo must put aside their differences and work together when they uncover a plot to sabotage the company their parents work for. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Alec Baldwin, Steve Buscemi, Jimmy Kimmel and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Dog Man (2025)
programme.desc: A half-human canine is sworn to protect and serve as he faces feline supervillain Petey the Cat. Animated comedy, with the voices of Pete Davidson, Poppy Liu, Lil Rel Howery and Isla Fisher

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: Trolls (2016)
programme.desc: A tribe of perpetually happy fuzzy-headed creatures are kidnapped by a race of giants who intend to eat them. The princess of the clan escapes and plans a rescue mission - but to save her friends, she will need the help of a grumpy troll with a loathing of music who has rejected their joyful culture to live as a loner. Animated musical, with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies (2018)
programme.desc: Five teenage superheroes, miffed by the fact they aren't deemed worthy enough for their own big screen films, set out to prove themselves by tackling the villainous Slade and his maniacal plan for world domination. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton, Will Arnett and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice (2022)
programme.desc: A streetwise cat has the perfect money-making scam after finding a pipe-playing kid who has a horde of strangely literate rats. Animated adventure based on the Terry Pratchett story, featuring the voices of Hugh Laurie, Emilia Clarke and David Thewlis

programme.title: Dog Man (2025)
programme.desc: A half-human canine is sworn to protect and serve as he faces feline supervillain Petey the Cat. Animated comedy, with the voices of Pete Davidson, Poppy Liu, Lil Rel Howery and Isla Fisher

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Satirical sci-fi thriller, starring David Carradine, Sylvester Stallone and Simone Griffeth.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team attend a man who has slipped while crossing a stream and is left with a bone sticking out of his arm. In Wasdale, an emergency call has come in for a man with a badly broken leg on the Corridor Route to Scafell Pike. Darkness is closing in, and the first challenge is to locate the casualty. Leaving him on the hill in plummeting temperatures would be life-threatening

programme.title: The Greatest Auction

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Teleshopping feature bringing you the hottest destinations and latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Riya and Nanda have a sad and unloved garden in Groby, Leicestershire, with an outdated pink and yellow 'Battenburg' patio, a tumble down shed and a huge gravel slope. This really is a plot that needs to be rescued, especially as Riya is soon to be married and they are hoping to host some of the celebrations in the garden. Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam offer expert advice, which involves picking up on the reds and golds of Riya's wedding colours in the planting

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, recently married Norline and Wendell are looking for a new garden to relax and socialise in and for Wendell to pursue his passion for cooking. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill affer alternate designs to make their dreams come true. Flo's is chosen, and it's not long before the team sets about building her garden with touches of the couple's Jamaican heritage

programme.title: Love Your Garden

programme.title: New Home DIY

programme.title: New Home DIY

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Beck's redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: In Portugal's capital city, Lisbon, a pair of loved-up newbies join the trip, while one celeb is sadly missing in action. The group also heads to the beach for some paddleboarding

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Brecon Beacons couple Rob and Rachel Jones have little time to do any gardening as they are busy raising five children, including an autistic son and a daughter with cerebral palsy. Their garden is a mishmash of unconnected areas that they want to transform into a space that can bring all the family together. Enter Alan Titchmarsh and the team, who set about making their dreams come true, adding a bespoke barbecue, a huge gazebo, a water feature, an area for the teenagers and a range of plants that appeal to all five senses

programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: Doomwatch (1972)
programme.desc: A scientist is sent to an island off the Cornish coast to investigate pollution. What he discovers is far more terrifying - a chemical that has been dumped in the water is causing the islanders to develops strange mutations. Sci-fi thriller, starring Ian Bannen and Judy Geeson

programme.title: Real Thick Glasses
programme.desc: Soloman Watkins' quirky take as he interviews Michael, owner of the world's most unique collection of Really Thick Glasses. Funded and supported by Together TV and Cat Flap Media.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Beck's redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Roo Irvine, trader Danny Sebastian and upcycling blacksmith Kevin Paxton head to the Scottish Borders to rummage through its antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets in the hope of finding items they can each turn into a healthy profit. When the day is done and they've got their items, they have just three weeks to turn them into cash

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Teleshopping feature bringing you the hottest destinations and latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Debra from Wigan, Greater Manchester, wants her new build plot to be transformed into a calming zen garden for relaxation and contemplation. She'd also like it to be low maintenance and maximise the views from the woodland beyond. Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill try to bring her vision to life on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam meet Danni and Dawn, a couple from Biggleswade who want a whimsical wonderland in their back garden for their five-year-old twins. With a £5,000 budget, designers Charlie and Flo are ready to let their creative juices flow

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Brecon Beacons couple Rob and Rachel Jones have little time to do any gardening as they are busy raising five children, including an autistic son and a daughter with cerebral palsy. Their garden is a mishmash of unconnected areas that they want to transform into a space that can bring all the family together. Enter Alan Titchmarsh and the team, who set about making their dreams come true, adding a bespoke barbecue, a huge gazebo, a water feature, an area for the teenagers and a range of plants that appeal to all five senses

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Gosport knocking down an internal wall to turn a property's outside toilet into a cloakroom

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Reclaimed bricks are used during a masterclass in old-English brickwork from the ground up

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts buyers bid for Oasis lyrics hand-written by frontman Noel Gallagher for his brother Liam, a pair of Nike trainers with a £4,000 reserve, a sculpture by British artist Anish Kapoor and some vintage Louis Vuitton luggage with an interesting history

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach is in Lisbon, where tour guide Brendan Sheerin drops a vote twist that puts one couple under instant pressure. The group also make Portuguese custard tarts

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team create a horticultural haven for 90-year-old grandmother Iris Insole from Barking, east London, who has found gardening difficult since the death of her husband. A new path and wildlife-friendly roses are among the features they add - along with a summer house full of memories

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Debra from Wigan, Greater Manchester, wants her new build plot to be transformed into a calming zen garden for relaxation and contemplation. She'd also like it to be low maintenance and maximise the views from the woodland beyond. Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill try to bring her vision to life on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam meet Danni and Dawn, a couple from Biggleswade who want a whimsical wonderland in their back garden for their five-year-old twins. With a £5,000 budget, designers Charlie and Flo are ready to let their creative juices flow

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: A fallen scrambler with head and neck injuries is precariously lodged at the edge of a waterfall for several hours and moving him threatens further problems. However, with the cold mountain water bringing him close to hypothermia, the team has little choice. On the other side of the Lakes, a local marathon brings its own challenges as temperatures soar towards 30 degrees Celsius

programme.title: Mary Millington: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair (1979)
programme.desc: A seductive astrologer's carefree life is brought crashing to a halt when he is accused of robbery and cannot win over the only person able to provide an alibi. He faces a possibly greater challenge in providing a woman who has never had an orgasm with the satisfaction she has long been deprived of. Sex comedy, starring Alan Lake and Diana Dors

programme.title: Got It Made (1974)
programme.desc: Norfolk-set coming-of-age drama. Mere days before her wedding, an aristocratic girl discovers some hideous truths about the people closest to her. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Mark Stacey, wheeler-dealer Tony Wong and upcycler Zoe Pocock head to Exeter to find some bargains they can turn into profit for Children in Need. programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: A UK gangster with links to the infamous Brinks Mat robbery is killed in a South London suburb.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Serial Killer in the Making?
programme.desc: Jackie Malton revisits the case of Alun Kyte, the Midlands Ripper, who murdered two women near Leicestershire in 1993 and 1994.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Cliff Top Killer
programme.desc: Geoffrey Wansell explores the story of John Cooper, who murdered four people on the Pembrokeshire coast. He was convicted decades later thanks to forensic evidence.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A groom is killed on his wedding day, and Murdoch soon learns the man was a homosexual and the marriage a sham, contrived to secure a substantial inheritance. programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden investigate the death of a member of the men's eight rowing team at a prestigious club. Yannick Bisson stars

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective investigates the death of a man apparently forced to drink varnish. He encounters the victim's son, a ventriloquist who claims his father was an alcoholic. Author Arthur Conan Doyle helps him in his quest, claiming he wants to base a new character on Murdoch

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.sub-title: A Stab in the Dark Web
programme.desc: As Major Crimes investigates a dark web marketplace, Charlie and Rex protect a witness in their home

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie is forced to confront her painful past when Dr Eugene Lustig, a prominent researcher who helped her understand her condition, is found dead - having fallen from a 12-storey building. A recent conflict puts his disgruntled assistant at the top of the suspect list - until he too is killed - and a search of the latest victim's apartment uncovers a box of tapes from one of Lustig's studies, some of which include footage of Carrie. A cassette is missing, however, and its significance could be the key to cracking the case

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwayne's assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwayne's assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a truck transporting liquid explosive is hijacked by criminals, Charlie and Rex must race against time to prevent the case from blowing sky high

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A groom is killed on his wedding day, and Murdoch soon learns the man was a homosexual and the marriage a sham, contrived to secure a substantial inheritance. programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie is forced to confront her painful past when Dr Eugene Lustig, a prominent researcher who helped her understand her condition, is found dead - having fallen from a 12-storey building. A recent conflict puts his disgruntled assistant at the top of the suspect list - until he too is killed - and a search of the latest victim's apartment uncovers a box of tapes from one of Lustig's studies, some of which include footage of Carrie. A cassette is missing, however, and its significance could be the key to cracking the case

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry presents an extended edition of the quiz that tests the most obscure parts of contestants' general knowledge, awarding points for interesting answers as well as correct ones. Regular panellist Alan Davies is joined by Bill Bailey, Jimmy Carr and Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell to answer fiendish questions on the topic of jargon

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.sub-title: Just Chips that Haven't Been Made Yet
programme.desc: The comedian ponders modern life, considering celebrity endorsements, and revealing what the Queen really thinks about shoe insoles

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ben is angry when a Halloween party is thrown at his house without his permission. Tom acts as an MC for an event in Leslie's campaign, but uses it as a way to promote his company. Meanwhile, Ron and Ann give an unusual wedding gift to Andy and April

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More than 100 boxes full of drugs are discovered inside an unlikely vehicle at the World Trade Bridge. In Progreso, a suspected gang member attempts to cross into the United States

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man kidnapped and beaten by a Mexican drug cartel flees across the bridge into America. At Progreso International Bridge, a woman is caught hiding anti-anxiety pills in her bra

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britain's finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britain's fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwall's hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the area's history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: At Golitha Falls, where the River Fowey tumbles down to the sea, Rick meets Dawn French, who has made Cornwall her home. In the shadow of Devonport Dockyard, he boards the world's busiest chain ferry to cross the wide River Tamar, the ancient watery boundary between Devon and Cornwall - along the way discovering an unusual event involving circus elephant. And he meets a man who thinks he has discovered the next superfood, which Rick used to cook up a delicious duck dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team reveals why the Isle of Harris is the perfect location for road-testing cabriolets, and find out if it is possible to parachute into a moving car travelling at 50mph. Richard Hammond unveils the blueprint for the perfect roadster and Ranulph Fiennes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets a good soaking when he takes BMW's off-roader, the X3 out for a spin, and Richard Hammond discovers how the Corvette C6 is a break with tradition. Plus, James May discovers the biggest item he can get into the back of a Volvo V50. Comedian Patrick Kielty is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer brave the wild lakes of Essex in search of the mighty carp. They have the latest high-tech equipment to catch the biggest fish they can - and are fully prepared to stay all night if they have to. The pair discuss the true meaning of a mid-life crisis and decide to visit a beauty clinic to see whether there are any suitable treatments available to re-capture their youth. Bob reveals his secret recipe to make the perfect scrambled eggs - but it's not the only thing that shocks Paul

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King continue their culinary journey around Asia by heading to Thailand, where they discover why Bangkok has a reputation as the street food capital of the world, and help serve up school dinners. Heading out into the country's central plains, the duo join paddy-field workers and find out how rice is grown

programme.desc: Clive Myrie hosts an extended edition of the current affairs quiz, with comedian Jon Richardson and journalist Marianna Spring joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, in which guests join team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea to answer questions based on opinion polls. Aisling is joined by Ant Middleton and Katherine Ryan, while Rob teams up with comedy actress Kerry Howard and comedian Ola

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain hosts as Maisie Adam, Angela Barnes, Ed Gamble, Glenn Moore and Ahir Shah join regular panellist Hugh Dennis to take a comic look back on the latest events in news and politics. Once again, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on one another

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Would I Lie to You? at Christmas
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Joe Lycett, Joe Swash and Ruth Madeley join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for this festive edition of the comedy game show. Did one of the panellists really program a satnav so their mother's trip to Lakeside ended up in the Lake District? And would one of the captains really hold up a train to get his daughter's cuddly toy back? Or were they just festive fibs? Rob Brydon hosts the fun

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Host Rob Brydon and team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell return with another episode of memorable moments from the hit comedy panel show. Among the participants setting out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves are Clare Balding, Liz Bonnin, Jo Brand, Asim Chaudhry, Victoria Coren Mitchell, Greg Davies, Simon Day, Greg James, Guz Khan, Gabby Logan, Chris McCausland, Stephen Merchant, Kiri Pritchard-McLean, Angela Scanlon, John Simm, Ranj Singh, Henning Wehn, Claudia Winkleman and Lucy Worsley

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry presents an extended version of the quiz, and unleashes a batch of fiendishly puzzling questions to test the general knowledge - or ignorance - of Jo Brand, Liza Tarbuck, Sue Perkins and regular panellist Alan Davies, who reveal what they know about topics including jelly, jam and juice

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish

programme.title: Pointless

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers discover bundles of cocaine hidden inside the wheel wells of an SUV, and two retirees are caught trying to smuggle weight loss medication across the border

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers discover a fuel tanker with bundles of cocaine hidden in the cab, and three men with fake IDs and a gruesome video of a murder on their phones are questioned

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick heads into the county's china clay pits to discover what is known locally as white gold, one of its most important industries. He then climbs the Cornish Alps, huge slag heaps created by the clay mining and some of Cornwall's highest land. After a wild swim at one of Cornwall's picturesque hidden coves, Rick cooks a simple sea bass recipe, revealing how to make the perfect mayonnaise. In the far west of the county, on the Land's End peninsula, Rick meets his niece, a modern artist, who explains her deep spiritual connection to Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the post-war British modern art movement in the seaside town of St Ives, the home for leading artists such as Barbara Hepworth and Terry Frost. At the Lizard Peninsula, Rick heads out to sea to fish for red mullet, and on the wild coast at Land's End, he discovers why Cornwall has a rather unusual animal as its national emblem

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Roseland Peninsula, beginning at a spot believed by some to have been visited by Jesus Christ. He tours the bay of St Mawes with Alex and Olga Polizzi, who own one of Cornwall's most luxurious hotels, and meets one of the county's oldest butchers, who demonstrates the ancient practice of aging meat. Finally, in the harbourside village of Mousehole, Rick meets a potter who finds inspiration from the local landscape

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Tintagel, Cornwall's most mythical place, which was an important trading port with Europe and the birthplace of perhaps Britain's greatest legend - the tale of King Arthur. He also learns how the Methodists were important to Cornwall, and how they would cook a rather unusual bun during feast days, and meets a family on the Roseland Peninsula who are continuing the surprisingly ancient tradition of growing an exotic spice - saffron

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and the gang are back with another high-octane instalment of the popular motoring series. The Porsche 911 is put through its paces on the racetrack and the British Jaguar S type is pitted against its rivals, the American Chrysler 300C and the Australian Vauxhall Monaro VXR. Plus, a chance to help preserve an element of motoring history in Restoration. Comedian Bill Bailey is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The Ford Focus is put through its paces, the Ferrari Enzo burns rubber on the track, and the supercars of the 1980s are pitted against their modern-day counterparts. There's a race between a child on a skateboard and a turbo-charged rally car, and Geri Horner is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob Mortimer has harboured a childhood dream to catch a salmon, so together with friend Paul Whitehouse, he sets off for the River Tay in Scotland full of hope and excitement. A ghillie guides them up the intimidating river in a boat and they fish using various methods to catch the elusive fish. They stay in the heart of the Highlands, where Bob cooks Paul a traditional Scottish breakfast and enjoy a swift round of golf before resuming their fishing. The duo also reflect on luck and fate and the part it has played in their lives and later assess whether the trip has lived up to their expectations

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The first of two programmes in which the presenter explores the country that lies at the crossroads between Europe and Asia, and discovers the dramatic changes it is undergoing. The first leg of his journey begins in Istanbul, from which he travels along the Aegean coast to the hostile border with Syria. He meets refugees trying to start a new life and a billionaire taking advantage of a property boom. He moves on into the Taurus Mountains and the Black Sea Coast, and visits a community trying to keep an ancient language alive

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King conclude their culinary journey around Thailand by travelling to the beaches of the south and the mountains of the north to discover how the country's multicultural history and its place at the heart of the spice trade created a rich and varied cuisine. They meet a coconut-picking monkey, head out to sea during a monsoon for a nerve-racking fishing expedition and cook a curry for a remote hill tribe

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Documentary with unrestricted access to America's Customs and Border Protection working on the bridges that separate Texas and Mexico

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the rich and diverse history of West Penwith, the farthest point west in mainland Britain. He visits Lamorna Cove, made famous through song and art, and the Unesco-protected tin and copper mining area of Botallack, where he talks to a mining explorer. The chef also follows an ancient track in search of Cornwall's oldest building and reveals how, as a young lad on the Lizard Peninsula, he fell in love for the first time and tasted his first French fish stew - known as a bouillabaisse

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: As the chef's Cornish odyssey nears its end, he takes a break in the city of Truro, where he discovers an unusual ghost story and tours the magnificent cathedral. He also meets a family passionate about offal, who prepare Rick a meal of pickled ox tongue and beef heart tacos, and in the county's most northerly parish he tells the story of an eccentric vicar who would retrieve the bodies from nearby shipwrecks and bury them in his church graveyard

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, in which guests join team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea to answer questions based on opinion polls. Aisling is joined by Ant Middleton and Katherine Ryan, while Rob teams up with comedy actress Kerry Howard and comedian Ola

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry presents an extended edition of the quiz that tests the most obscure parts of contestants' general knowledge, awarding points for interesting answers as well as correct ones. Regular panellist Alan Davies is joined by Bill Bailey, Jimmy Carr and Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell to answer fiendish questions on the topic of jargon

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.sub-title: Just Chips that Haven't Been Made Yet
programme.desc: The comedian ponders modern life, considering celebrity endorsements, and revealing what the Queen really thinks about shoe insoles

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ben is angry when a Halloween party is thrown at his house without his permission. Tom acts as an MC for an event in Leslie's campaign, but uses it as a way to promote his company. Meanwhile, Ron and Ann give an unusual wedding gift to Andy and April

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More than 100 boxes full of drugs are discovered inside an unlikely vehicle at the World Trade Bridge. In Progreso, a suspected gang member attempts to cross into the United States

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man kidnapped and beaten by a Mexican drug cartel flees across the bridge into America. At Progreso International Bridge, a woman is caught hiding anti-anxiety pills in her bra

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britain's finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. Just off Pentire Point, as the sun sets, Rick rides the gentle swell of the north Atlantic with an old friend, casting his line to hook Britain's fastest fish, before firing up the barbecue to cook his catch with a recipe inspired from a trip to Goa. Rick joins Tim Smit, best known for starting the hugely successful Eden Project, who reveals to Rick his new and ambitious idea in Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwall's hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the area's history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: At Golitha Falls, where the River Fowey tumbles down to the sea, Rick meets Dawn French, who has made Cornwall her home. In the shadow of Devonport Dockyard, he boards the world's busiest chain ferry to cross the wide River Tamar, the ancient watery boundary between Devon and Cornwall - along the way discovering an unusual event involving circus elephant. And he meets a man who thinks he has discovered the next superfood, which Rick used to cook up a delicious duck dish

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team reveals why the Isle of Harris is the perfect location for road-testing cabriolets, and find out if it is possible to parachute into a moving car travelling at 50mph. Richard Hammond unveils the blueprint for the perfect roadster and Ranulph Fiennes is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets a good soaking when he takes BMW's off-roader, the X3 out for a spin, and Richard Hammond discovers how the Corvette C6 is a break with tradition. Plus, James May discovers the biggest item he can get into the back of a Volvo V50. Comedian Patrick Kielty is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer brave the wild lakes of Essex in search of the mighty carp. They have the latest high-tech equipment to catch the biggest fish they can - and are fully prepared to stay all night if they have to. The pair discuss the true meaning of a mid-life crisis and decide to visit a beauty clinic to see whether there are any suitable treatments available to re-capture their youth. Bob reveals his secret recipe to make the perfect scrambled eggs - but it's not the only thing that shocks Paul

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of the journey takes in Morocco, where Simon visits a land borders between Africa and the European Union, and the coast of Spain, taking in the scale of the country's fruit and vegetable industry. He discovers why tourists are actively discouraged from visiting Corsica, and goes diving in waters that have the highest fish population in the Mediterranean

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King continue their culinary journey around Asia by heading to Thailand, where they discover why Bangkok has a reputation as the street food capital of the world, and help serve up school dinners. Heading out into the country's central plains, the duo join paddy-field workers and find out how rice is grown

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick journeys inland from the majestic Camel Estuary to one of Britain's finest vineyards, where he joins in harvesting the grapes to discover that the Cornish weather is perfect making some of the best wine in the country. The first leg of his journey begins in Istanbul, from which he travels along the Aegean coast to the hostile border with Syria. He meets refugees trying to start a new life and a billionaire taking advantage of a property boom. He moves on into the Taurus Mountains and the Black Sea Coast, and visits a community trying to keep an ancient language alive

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Asian Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King conclude their culinary journey around Thailand by travelling to the beaches of the south and the mountains of the north to discover how the country's multicultural history and its place at the heart of the spice trade created a rich and varied cuisine. They meet a coconut-picking monkey, head out to sea during a monsoon for a nerve-racking fishing expedition and cook a curry for a remote hill tribe

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick heads into the county's china clay pits to discover what is known locally as white gold, one of its most important industries. He then climbs the Cornish Alps, huge slag heaps created by the clay mining and some of Cornwall's highest land. After a wild swim at one of Cornwall's picturesque hidden coves, Rick cooks a simple sea bass recipe, revealing how to make the perfect mayonnaise. In the far west of the county, on the Land's End peninsula, Rick meets his niece, a modern artist, who explains her deep spiritual connection to Cornwall

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the post-war British modern art movement in the seaside town of St Ives, the home for leading artists such as Barbara Hepworth and Terry Frost. At the Lizard Peninsula, Rick heads out to sea to fish for red mullet, and on the wild coast at Land's End, he discovers why Cornwall has a rather unusual animal as its national emblem

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Roseland Peninsula, beginning at a spot believed by some to have been visited by Jesus Christ. He tours the bay of St Mawes with Alex and Olga Polizzi, who own one of Cornwall's most luxurious hotels, and meets one of the county's oldest butchers, who demonstrates the ancient practice of aging meat. Finally, in the harbourside village of Mousehole, Rick meets a potter who finds inspiration from the local landscape

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Tintagel, Cornwall's most mythical place, which was an important trading port with Europe and the birthplace of perhaps Britain's greatest legend - the tale of King Arthur. He also learns how the Methodists were important to Cornwall, and how they would cook a rather unusual bun during feast days, and meets a family on the Roseland Peninsula who are continuing the surprisingly ancient tradition of growing an exotic spice - saffron

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob Mortimer has harboured a childhood dream to catch a salmon, so together with friend Paul Whitehouse, he sets off for the River Tay in Scotland full of hope and excitement. A ghillie guides them up the intimidating river in a boat and they fish using various methods to catch the elusive fish. They stay in the heart of the Highlands, where Bob cooks Paul a traditional Scottish breakfast and enjoy a swift round of golf before resuming their fishing. The duo also reflect on luck and fate and the part it has played in their lives and later assess whether the trip has lived up to their expectations

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.sub-title: Would I Lie to You? at Christmas
programme.desc: Jo Brand, Joe Lycett, Joe Swash and Ruth Madeley join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for this festive edition of the comedy game show. Did one of the panellists really program a satnav so their mother's trip to Lakeside ended up in the Lake District? And would one of the captains really hold up a train to get his daughter's cuddly toy back? Or were they just festive fibs? Rob Brydon hosts the fun

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Taking part are Les Dennis, Richard Osman, Alice Levine and Lou Sanders

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry presents an extended version of the quiz, and unleashes a batch of fiendishly puzzling questions to test the general knowledge - or ignorance - of Jo Brand, Liza Tarbuck, Sue Perkins and regular panellist Alan Davies, who reveal what they know about topics including jelly, jam and juice

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.desc: Howard hires a surveillance team to follow Pearl when his suspicions are aroused during a telephone conversation. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Robert Fyfe and Juliette Kaplan

programme.desc: Mick and Shazia visit Cornwall's famous Towan Studios where some rare rock memorabilia has been stolen and the owner killed

Archie and Michelle meet a postgraduate student at an eco-fair

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A cafe owner makes his distaste for a woman breast-feeding on his premises vehemently known, and receives a stern warning from a group of women determined to change his ways. Heston offers Michelle and Ruth the use of his home in Tuscany for a holiday, and Melody becomes jealous when Archie receives a surprise visit from an attractive postgraduate

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Mickie accidentally tells a woman she isn't pregnant when she is - a mistake that almost costs the patient her life in the operating theatre. Owen learns Lauren is seeking an injunction to prevent him seeing Katy, while Connie and Michael conspire to stop Ric getting his old job back so they can hire someone more accommodating to their plans. Tricia discovers Mark has nowhere to stay, and offers him the use of her spare room

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Linda struggles to incorporate the care of her sister's two children into her hectic schedule, but finds support from an unlikely source. Meanwhile, Lloyd tries to piece together the series of events that led to a woman with Alzheimer's being admitted, and Keith Parr returns to the ED with an injury that could have been sustained when Sam forcibly restrained him. Guest starring Marshall Lancaster, Jean Boht and Jayne Ashbourne

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Highlights of the second series of the documentary following the work of the UK's North Sea fishermen and their families

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The model-making company, home to four iconic brands, Hornby, Airfix, Scalextric and Corgi, opens its doors to reveal how their dedicated team of designers strive to shrink a new generation of mighty machines. A perfect diecast replica of a 1940's Merchant Navy steam locomotive is the task for Hornby's design team

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Experienced designer Carl has a challenge on his hands attempting to recreate a First World War biplane as a 1/48th scale Corgi model

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Footage of animals that have unusual means of finding their way around. Dung beetles are able to navigate by the sky, using the position of the sun, moon and stars to determine which is the right direction to go in, while pigeons display remarkable powers of memory, able to recall complex travel routes and follow manmade roads and hedgerows

programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer leads a team on a mission to summit a remote and unclimbed mountain in the Stauning Alps of Greenland, crossing a vast river and skiing across a glacier

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve leads a cave-diving team into the largest unexplored cave network on Earth. Below the jungles of Mexico, they push further and deeper than anyone has gone before

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer ventures into more uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries and world firsts, beginning by heading to the Kamchatka Peninsula in the far east of Russia. He joins a team of world-class kayakers to take on the first descent of the Kronotsky River, setting out to paddle from source to sea, starting in the shadow of a still-active volcano and ending at the Pacific Ocean

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve joins forces with ropes expert Aldo Kane and Saudi Arabian geologists Mahmoud Al-Shanti and Hala Alwagdani to explore a volcanic underworld in search of the longest lava tube in the Arabian Peninsula. Geological evidence suggests that at least 400km of tunnels lie beneath the Harrat Khaybar lava field, subterranean passageways that could contain bones and artefacts from ancient civilisations. Only 25km of these lava tubes have ever been explored - until now

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The final leg of Simon's journey along the northern tropic begins in Laos, where he takes a boat down the Mekong River, and in Vietnam he investigates the trafficking of young women into China. Simon then heads to Taiwan where he visits the typhoon-damaged central highlands and he concludes his trip in Hawaii, which he discovers may not be quite the paradise the tourist brochures claim

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek auctions off some vehicles that were used in the TV show Heartbeat. There's love for an Austin Cambridge and a sporty Italian number finds a new home

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: The model-making company, home to four iconic brands, Hornby, Airfix, Scalextric and Corgi, opens its doors to reveal how their dedicated team of designers strive to shrink a new generation of mighty machines. A perfect diecast replica of a 1940's Merchant Navy steam locomotive is the task for Hornby's design team

programme.title: Hornby: A Model World
programme.desc: Experienced designer Carl has a challenge on his hands attempting to recreate a First World War biplane as a 1/48th scale Corgi model

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Footage of animals that have unusual means of finding their way around. Dung beetles are able to navigate by the sky, using the position of the sun, moon and stars to determine which is the right direction to go in, while pigeons display remarkable powers of memory, able to recall complex travel routes and follow manmade roads and hedgerows

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer leads a team on a mission to summit a remote and unclimbed mountain in the Stauning Alps of Greenland, crossing a vast river and skiing across a glacier

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve leads a cave-diving team into the largest unexplored cave network on Earth. Below the jungles of Mexico, they push further and deeper than anyone has gone before

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer ventures into more uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries and world firsts, beginning by heading to the Kamchatka Peninsula in the far east of Russia. He joins a team of world-class kayakers to take on the first descent of the Kronotsky River, setting out to paddle from source to sea, starting in the shadow of a still-active volcano and ending at the Pacific Ocean

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve joins forces with ropes expert Aldo Kane and Saudi Arabian geologists Mahmoud Al-Shanti and Hala Alwagdani to explore a volcanic underworld in search of the longest lava tube in the Arabian Peninsula. Geological evidence suggests that at least 400km of tunnels lie beneath the Harrat Khaybar lava field, subterranean passageways that could contain bones and artefacts from ancient civilisations. Only 25km of these lava tubes have ever been explored - until now

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head to head at the auction

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess. They also meet a collector who may be willing to finally part with his 220-car collection

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack heads to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference, and luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what's been brought in for auction

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: A new £12million pelagic boat presents trouble for Willie and Peter Tait when its state-of-the-art communications system breaks down. Meanwhile, James Buchan finds his cheaper method, using a delicate seine net, has its own risks as he searches for fish among wrecks on the seabed

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: On board Amity, Jimmy Buchan lands a hefty catch of prawns and wrestles with fears for his own safety and for the lives of his crew. On the Fruitful Harvest, Sandy swaps places with his 18-year-old apprentice in a role-reversal, which turns out to be an eye-opening experience. Later, when the boats return home to Peterhead, they get a shock that nobody could have anticipated

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Highlights of the second series of the documentary following the work of the UK's North Sea fishermen and their families

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels around the islands and mainland coast of the Caribbean Sea, beginning on Hispaniola. He joins the Dominican Republic police's anti-narcotics division, before crossing the border to Haiti to see the notorious tented slums of Cite Soleil, while also discovering a vibrant, colourful and thriving side to the country. He ends this leg of his journey in Puerto Rico, an archipelago that is a territory of the United States, and examines the legacy of bombing and weapons testing on the island of Vieques

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars in the period drama version of The Terminator and Mr Cholmondeley-Warner presents a few handy hints on self defence. Elsewhere, the Scousers plan to rob a building society

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When Lucy needs help writing an important speech she is due to give at a recruitment conference, Lee hopes to impress her by offering his services. However, Tim also thinks he could do a good job and it turns into a fierce competition to discover who can come up with the wittiest lines. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Tim Vine

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: Mr Cholmondley-Warner offers his idiosyncratic views on madness, while Stan and Pam flash their cash in Spain. Kevin refuses to go to bed, Tim gets engaged to a royal and Alf Git meets an old flame at a funeral with explosive results

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Inside No 9
programme.desc: Joe and Chas have been together for nine years, a long time to be truly in love with someone. But how long does it take to properly say goodbye? Darkly comic tale, written by and starring Steve Pemberton and Reece Shearsmith, with a guest appearance from Sheila Reid

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Peggy becomes a Yellowcoat, but her happiness is spoilt when Alec Foster arrives with bad news. Last-ever episode of the hit comedy, starring Su Pollard and Ruth Madoc
